item.title: 着色 [第 1 部分] | Colorize [PART-ONE]
item.description:
乔纳坦·利马

发表于进程列表

困难重重



原文:

Jonatan Lima

Posted on May 12

Nessa etapa precisei entende como kitty altera seu temas através da linha de comando.
Utilizando o comando kitty +kitten themes --reload-in=all
"Theme name" conseguimos alterar o tema.
Mas esse comando consegue listar tanto os "temas globais" como os que estão na pasta .config/kitty/themes/, meu objetivo é listar somente que estão nessa pasta, pois o kitten já retorna todos os temas globais e os temas que estão dentro da pasta.
Iniciei criando uma lib chamada commands para isolar as funções responsaveis por fazer as alterações, acredito que devo mudar e criar uma lib chamada kitty e outra para o neovim.
Criei várias funções privadas e disponibilizei somente duas funções, uma para listar os temas que será usada na UI e outra que de fato irá executar a ação de alterar o tema.

Processo de listar os temas

Nessa etapa precisava ser capaz de listar todos os temas que existem na pasta .config/kitty/themes/ com os nomes formatados, com letra iniciais maiúsculas e separadas por espaço se forem nomes compostos, seguindo as etapas:

  1. Executar comando ls ./config/kitty/themes para listar os temas.
  2. Verificar se ocorreu algum erro no processo de leitura do diretório.
  3. Formatar o nome dos temas, pois os arquivos tem seus nomes escritos em snake_case e possuiem a exetensão .conf.
  4. Retornar um Vec<String> (Array em outras linguagens) com os temas formatados.

Dificuldades
item.author: jonatanlima

item.title: 您是否正在努力登录 Heroku？ 这就是为什么。 | Are you struggling to sign into Heroku? Here's why.
item.description:
卢克·卡特赖特

发表于最近 Heroku 由于一个漏洞停止了与 GitHub 的集成。 请参阅下面的我的文章：

那么为什么你现在不能登录 Heroku 呢？

除了明显的问题之外，您确定您使用的是正确的密码吗？ 你确定吗？ 好的，我相信你，因为 Heroku 希望所有用户都重置他们的密码。

那么你需要做什么？

单击登录页面上的忘记密码链接并重置。 这将加强所有 heroku 帐户的安全性。 此外，我相信他们也在为所有帐户推出多因素身份验证。

这对安全性非常有利，并降低了安全事件再次发生的可能性。

谢谢你的聆听。 如果这对您有所帮助，请点赞这篇文章或在下面发表评论。

状态英雄编辑人员 - May 11 5月11日

Lucas Teixeira dos Santos Santana - Lucas Teixeira dos Santos Santana - May 11 5月11日



原文:

Luke Cartwright

Posted on May 12

Recently Heroku stopped the integration with GitHub due to a vulnerability. See my article on this below:

So why can you not login to Heroku now?

Other than the obvious question of, are you sure you are using the correct password? Are you sure? Okay, I believe you because Heroku wants ALL users to reset their passwords.

So what do you need to do?

Click on the forgotten password link on the login page and reset it. This will tighten security for all heroku accounts. Also I believe they are rolling out Multi factor authentication for all accounts too.

This is great for security and reduces the likelihood of the security incident to happen again.

Thank you for listening. If this has helped you, please like this post or comment below.

Status Hero Editorial Staff - May 11

Lucas Teixeira dos Santos Santana - May 11
item.author: lukeecart

item.title: 新增内容 - Laravel 9.12 发布 | New Things Added - Laravel 9.12 Released
item.description:
让我们快速开始我在 Laravel 9.12 Released 中发现了新的东西我想和你分享。

  • 抛出 If HTTP 客户端方法

延迟每个频道的通知

您可以将数组传递给延迟方法以指定特定通道的延迟量

$user -> notify (( new InvoicePaid ( $invoice )) -> delay ([ 'mail' => now () -> addMinutes ( 5 ), 'sms' => now () -> addMinutes ( 10 ), ]));

您还可以在通知类上定义 withDelay 方法

/** * Determine the notification's delivery delay. * * @param mixed $notifiable * @return array */ public function withDelay ( $notifiable ) { return [ 'mail' => now () -> addMinutes ( 5 ), 'sms' => now () -> addMinutes ( 10 ), ]; }

我希望你喜欢我，并了解有关此版本的更多信息，请访问资源并进行更多搜索。 我崇拜你寻找新事物的人。
来源：- https://laravel-news.com/laravel-9-12-0



原文:

Let's get started quickly I found new things in Laravel 9.12 Released I wanted to share with you.

  • Throw If HTTP Client Method

method to the HTTP client that will throw an exception if the condition evaluates to true

// Throws RequestException
return Http::baseUrl('https://foo.bar') ->throwIf(true) ->get('not-found'); // Doesn't throw
return Http::baseUrl('https://foo.bar') ->throwIf(false) ->get('not-found');
  • Delaying Notifications Per Channel

You can pass an array to the delay method to specify the delay amount for specific channels

$user->notify((new InvoicePaid($invoice))->delay([ 'mail' => now()->addMinutes(5), 'sms' => now()->addMinutes(10),
]));

You can also define a withDelay method on the notification class

/** * Determine the notification's delivery delay. * * @param mixed $notifiable * @return array */
public function withDelay($notifiable)
{ return [ 'mail' => now()->addMinutes(5), 'sms' => now()->addMinutes(10), ];
}

I hope you enjoyed with me and to learn more about this release visit the sources and search more. I adore you who search for everything new.
Source :- https://laravel-news.com/laravel-9-12-0
item.author: morcosgad

item.title: 如何将 Spotify API 与 Next.js 一起使用 | How to use Spotify API with Next.js
item.description:
在我的网站上，有一个统计页面，其中展示了许多内容，例如我的 Dev.to 博客统计信息和 GitHub 存储库计数以及 Spotify 统计信息，我们将讨论如何在您的梦想项目中实现它。

目录

创建一个 Spotify 应用程序

首先，我们需要在 spotify 上创建一个应用程序——

  • 转到Spotify 开发者仪表板
  • 使用 Spotify 帐户登录
  • 点击创建应用
  • 填写名称和描述，然后单击创建
  • 将您的客户端 ID 和机密保存在您的.env.local中
  • 单击右上角的Edit Setting并将http://localhost:3000/callback添加为回调 url ，然后单击Save 。

一切都完成了。 现在让我们进入身份验证的内容。

使用refresh_token进行身份验证

我们使用refresh_token进行多种类型的身份验证，因为我们只想进行一次身份验证。 您可以在此处了解授权

授权码

正如您在上图中所见，我们拥有除范围之外的所有内容。 这定义了我们需要从 Spotify API 获取的内容。

为此，我们需要一个将url参数发送到 Spotify 的 url-

  • 我们想要获取用户的热门统计信息和当前播放的歌曲。 因为该范围是user-top-read和user-read-currently-playing 。 您可以添加任意数量的范围，以空格 (" ") 分隔。 所以，现在我们的 URL 看起来像这样（输入你的项目client_id ）-

     # decoded URL https://accounts.spotify.com/authorize?client_id = bda10cd719564898818245d97727de7e&response_type = code&redirect_uri = http://localhost:3000/callback&scope = user-read-currently-playing user-top-read

    但是我们不能使用这个 URL，因为我们需要对 URL 字符串进行编码，为此，您可以使用这个工具。 现在编码 URL 看起来像这样 -

     # encoded URL https%3A%2F%2Faccounts.spotify.com%2Fauthorize%3Fclient_id%3Dbda10cd71956489881825d97727de7e%26response_type%3Dcode%26redirect_uri%3Dhttp%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3A3000%2Fcallback%26scope%3Duser-read-currently-playing+user-top-read

    现在在浏览器中输入 URL，然后单击Enter 。 授权后，您将被重定向回您的redirect_uri 。 在 URL 中，有一个code查询参数。 将此值存储在某处，因为我们将在下一步中需要它。

     # code http://localhost:3000/callback?code = CDxRCu......NLdsM

    获取refresh_token

    完成所有这些工作后，我们需要让refresh_token获得授权。 您需要生成一个 Base 64 编码字符串，其中包含之前的客户端 ID和客户端密码。 您可以使用此工具对其进行在线编码。 格式应与此client_id:client_secret完全相同。

    您的网址应如下所示 -

     # demo url to get "refresh_token" curl -H "Authorization: Basic <base64 encoded client_id:client_secret>" -d grant_type = authorization_code -d code = <code> -d redirect_uri = http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost:3000/callback https://accounts.spotify.com/api/token

    因此，在对客户端 ID和客户端密码进行编码后，它应该是这样的——

     YmRhMTBjZDcxOTU2NDg5ODgxODJmMmQ5NzcyN2RlN2U6NjZmZTU5OTJjYjZlNDFjZmEwNDdfkdjfkHKkjdfdwODk0YjI=

    现在最终的 url 应该是这样的 -

     curl -H "Authorization: Basic YmRhMTBjZDcxOTU2NDg5ODgxODJmMmQ5NzcyN2RlN2U6NjZmZTU5OTJjYjZlNDFjZmEwNDdfkdjfkHKkjdfdwODk0YjI=" -d grant_type = authorization_code -d code = AQD_kIzZ0OVXkeeIU4jnLWADFJDKdcWLYo9ySdfdfdkHKJFtGExxgw_aCxJrZflWVeARvjaGDfdfddf6KYpFlo2t2JZ0SQceyvdKs4AcGgCLSqm7vMyiRWCy_t06WmLet8v6aEBx8U4eKHxKiEx_sBgvCSlYo5wptKUd0Gwa6oyqOHFZnE7KSbxTVwMkQ668Ezjz2aeFEPp1TU9ij6dM4AjO4YFCH2hoMWgO3k5XrbdKnK7U2Y30wb8gHjEA6LnE8yu8cyvaY9WQ -d redirect_uri = http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost:3000/callback https://accounts.spotify.com/api/token

    在您的终端上运行它后，它将返回一个包含refresh_token的 JSON 对象。 除非您撤销访问权限，否则此令牌无限期有效，因此我们希望将其保存在环境变量中。 The JSON will looks like this- JSON 看起来像这样 -

     { "access_token" : "DKjdfkdjkdfjdRU67VlhTLc3HUHHRvcG6W3F56ISDFodvSiSmFZIIUwOzzZCyCcgOia-TXX-y_wq8n7jEHTI0JEYO6djABMQmlutMqsUPgEiVJ2isj98BrBYFV4dfdsjkfksudJKDUIkdfdfdk1vxR07V_r7Y-aLjMyqwBaSqxneFokM" , "token_type" : "Bearer" , "expires_in" : 3600 , "refresh_token" : "dfkdjkkdjfdfrrdkfjd9984maWbrIrXqNNK63SOzJdWQGaTYQGD6Ji1dWsAywEgm-eUspfuOlug8f71XL2oBWtD_pzd6EzCWwqCVnDSWspbJelOwVDY62TuAI" , "scope" : "user-read-currently-playing user-top-read user-read-private"
}

    这需要消化很多，但现在我们的工作已经完成，我们拥有授权所需的所有必要东西。

    设置环境变量

    现在我们在上述过程中得到的所有东西都需要添加到.env.local

     SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID = SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET = SPOTIFY_REFRESH_TOKEN =

    使用 Spotify API

    现在我们可以使用refresh_token来获得最终的access_token 。 以下代码使用refresh_token获取access_token

     // lib/spotify.js const getAccessToken = async () => { const refresh_token = process . env . SPOTIFY_REFRESH_TOKEN ; const response = await fetch ( " https://accounts.spotify.com/api/token " , { method : " POST " , headers : { Authorization : `Basic ${ Buffer . from ( ` ${ process . env . SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID } : ${ process . env . SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET } ` ). toString ( " base64 " )} ` , " Content-Type " : " application/x-www-form-urlencoded " , }, body : new URLSearchParams ({ grant_type : " refresh_token " , refresh_token , }), }); return response . json (); };

    获取热门曲目

    现在您可以使用此access_token获取您的数据。 在我们的例子中，它是顶级曲目。

     // lib/spotify.js export const topTracks = async () => { const { access_token } = await getAccessToken (); return fetch ( " https://api.spotify.com/v1/me/top/tracks " , { headers : { Authorization : `Bearer ${ access_token } ` , }, }); };

    创建 API 路由顶部轨道

    一开始，我提到我们将使用 Next.js API 路由。 如果您对此不熟悉，请阅读

    // pages/api/stats/tracks.js import { topTracks } from " ../../../lib/spotify " ; export default async function handler ( req , res ) { const response = await topTracks (); const { items } = await response . json (); const tracks = items . slice ( 0 , 5 ). map (( track ) => ({ title : track . name , artist : track . artists . map (( _artist ) => _artist . name ). join ( " , " ), url : track . external_urls . spotify , coverImage : track . album . images [ 1 ], })); res . setHeader ( " Cache-Control " , " public, s-maxage=86400, stale-while-revalidate=43200 " ); return res . status ( 200 ). json ( tracks ); }

    这将返回前五个热门曲目，我已经删除了不必要的信息。 您可以根据需要修改它。 现在访问localhost:3000/api/stats/tracks 。 如果一切正常，您应该会看到一些类似这样的数据 -

     // localhost: 3000 /api/stats/tracks [ // ........... { "title" : "Blowing Up" , "artist" : "KR$NA" , "url" : "https://open.spotify.com/track/3Oh2FwWbnKIAyUE2gToFYu" , "coverImage" : { "height" : 300 , "url" : "https://i.scdn.co/image/ab67616d00001e02f8c35169d5bab01327f87e5a" , "width" : 300 } }, { "title" : "Jaan Bolti Hai" , "artist" : "Karma" , "url" : "https://open.spotify.com/track/4KGZlLtfKV4raRbsoB2Rw9" , "coverImage" : { "height" : 300 , "url" : "https://i.scdn.co/image/ab67616d00001e028e3626063a42b11b847663b3" , "width" : 300 } }, //.........
]

    要查看我的统计数据，您可以访问https://jatin.vercel.app/api/stats/tracks 。

    获取顶级艺术家

    现在您可以使用此access_token获取您的数据。 在我们的例子中，它是顶级艺术家。

     // lib/spotify.js export const topArtists = async () => { const { access_token } = await getAccessToken (); return fetch ( " https://api.spotify.com/v1/me/top/artists " , { headers : { Authorization : `Bearer ${ access_token } ` , }, }); };

    创建 API 路由顶级艺术家

    // pages/api/stats/artists.js import { topArtists } from " ../../../lib/spotify " ; export default async function handler ( req , res ) { const response = await topArtists (); const { items } = await response . json (); const artists = items . slice ( 0 , 5 ). map (( artist ) => ({ name : artist . name , url : artist . external_urls . spotify , coverImage : artist . images [ 1 ], followers : artist . followers . total , })); res . setHeader ( " Cache-Control " , " public, s-maxage=86400, stale-while-revalidate=43200 " ); return res . status ( 200 ). json ( artists ); }

    它返回您的顶级 Spotify 艺术家。

    获取当前播放的歌曲

    现在，正如您在我网站的页脚中看到的那样，有一个选项可以查看我当前是否正在播放这首歌，如果是，那么是哪一首。 为此，我们获取以下 URL。

     // lib/spotify.js export const currentlyPlayingSong = async () => { const { access_token } = await getAccessToken (); return fetch ( " https://api.spotify.com/v1/me/player/currently-playing " , { headers : { Authorization : `Bearer ${ access_token } ` , }, }); };

    为当前正在播放的歌曲创建 API 路由

    // pages/api/now-playing.js import { currentlyPlayingSong } from " ../../lib/spotify " ; export default async function handler ( req , res ) { const response = await currentlyPlayingSong (); if ( response . status === 204 || response . status > 400 ) { return res . status ( 200 ). json ({ isPlaying : false }); } const song = await response . json (); if ( song . item === null ) { return res . status ( 200 ). json ({ isPlaying : false }); } const isPlaying = song . is_playing ; const title = song . item . name ; const artist = song . item . artists . map (( _artist ) => _artist . name ). join ( " , " ); const album = song . item . album . name ; const albumImageUrl = song . item . album . images [ 0 ]. url ; const songUrl = song . item . external_urls . spotify ; res . setHeader ( " Cache-Control " , " public, s-maxage=60, stale-while-revalidate=30 " ); return res . status ( 200 ). json ({ album , albumImageUrl , artist , isPlaying , songUrl , title , }); }

    如果用户正在播放歌曲，这将返回所有歌曲的详细信息。 否则， isPlaying将返回false 。 您现在可以处理这两种情况。 如果用户正在播放歌曲，则只需显示歌曲，否则显示未播放。

    您应该使用swr来获取数据，否则它会显示您可能不喜欢的旧数据。

    输出

    您可以在我的网站上查看此示例

    包起来

    如果您喜欢这篇文章，请不要忘记按❤️。 如果您有任何疑问或建议，请不要犹豫放弃它们。 再见。

    您可以通过给我买咖啡来扩大您的支持。😊👇



原文:

On my website, there is a stats page, which showcases many things such as my Dev.to blog stats and the GitHub repository count and the Spotify stats, we will talk about how you can implement that in your dream project.

Table of Contents

Create a Spotify App

Firstly, we need to create an application on the spotify-

  • Go to Spotify Developer Dashboard
  • Login with Spotify Account
  • Click on Create an App
  • Fill the Name and the Description then Click Create
  • Save your Client ID and Secret in your .env.local
  • Click on Edit Setting on top-right and add the http://localhost:3000/callback as the callback url and click on Save.

Everything is done. Now let's get into the authentication stuff.

Authentication with refresh_token

There are many types of authentication we are going with refresh_token because we only want to authenticate once. You can learn about Authorization here

Authorization Code

As you can see in the above image we have everything except scopes. Which defines, what we need fetch from the Spotify API.

To do that we need a url that send the following parameter to the Spotify-

  • response_type : it should be code (as shown in the image)
  • redirect_uri : callback url same as you enter in the Spotify Dashboard
  • client_id : your project's client_id
  • scope : you can read about that here

We want to fetch the user's top stats and the currently playing song. for that scope is user-top-read and user-read-currently-playing. You can add as many scopes as you want separated by space (" "). So, now our URL looks like this (enter your project client_id)-

# decoded URL  https://accounts.spotify.com/authorize?client_id=bda10cd719564898818245d97727de7e&response_type=code&redirect_uri=http://localhost:3000/callback&scope=user-read-currently-playing
user-top-read

But we cannot use this URL because we need to encode to the URL string, For that, you can use this tool. Now the encode URL looks like this-

# encoded URL 

https%3A%2F%2Faccounts.spotify.com%2Fauthorize%3Fclient_id%3Dbda10cd71956489881825d97727de7e%26response_type%3Dcode%26redirect_uri%3Dhttp%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3A3000%2Fcallback%26scope%3Duser-read-currently-playing+user-top-read

Now enter the URL in the browser and then click Enter. After authorizing, you'll be redirected back to your redirect_uri. In the URL, there's a code query parameter. Store this value somewhere because we are going to need it in the next step.

# code
http://localhost:3000/callback?code=CDxRCu......NLdsM

Get refresh_token

After doing all this work now we need to get the refresh_token to authorization. You'll need to generate a Base 64 encoded string containing the Client ID and Client Secret from earlier. You can use this tool to encode it online. The format should be exactly the same as this client_id:client_secret.

Your url should look like this -

# demo url to get "refresh_token" curl -H "Authorization: Basic <base64 encoded client_id:client_secret>"
-d grant_type=authorization_code -d code=<code> -d redirect_uri=http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost:3000/callback https://accounts.spotify.com/api/token

So after encoding the Client ID and Client Secret it should be looks like this-

YmRhMTBjZDcxOTU2NDg5ODgxODJmMmQ5NzcyN2RlN2U6NjZmZTU5OTJjYjZlNDFjZmEwNDdfkdjfkHKkjdfdwODk0YjI=

Now the final url should looks like this-

curl -H "Authorization: Basic YmRhMTBjZDcxOTU2NDg5ODgxODJmMmQ5NzcyN2RlN2U6NjZmZTU5OTJjYjZlNDFjZmEwNDdfkdjfkHKkjdfdwODk0YjI="
-d grant_type=authorization_code -d code=AQD_kIzZ0OVXkeeIU4jnLWADFJDKdcWLYo9ySdfdfdkHKJFtGExxgw_aCxJrZflWVeARvjaGDfdfddf6KYpFlo2t2JZ0SQceyvdKs4AcGgCLSqm7vMyiRWCy_t06WmLet8v6aEBx8U4eKHxKiEx_sBgvCSlYo5wptKUd0Gwa6oyqOHFZnE7KSbxTVwMkQ668Ezjz2aeFEPp1TU9ij6dM4AjO4YFCH2hoMWgO3k5XrbdKnK7U2Y30wb8gHjEA6LnE8yu8cyvaY9WQ -d redirect_uri=http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost:3000/callback https://accounts.spotify.com/api/token

After running this on your terminal it will return a JSON object containing refresh_token. This token is valid indefinitely unless you revoke access, so we'll want to save this in an environment variable. The JSON will looks like this-

{ "access_token":"DKjdfkdjkdfjdRU67VlhTLc3HUHHRvcG6W3F56ISDFodvSiSmFZIIUwOzzZCyCcgOia-TXX-y_wq8n7jEHTI0JEYO6djABMQmlutMqsUPgEiVJ2isj98BrBYFV4dfdsjkfksudJKDUIkdfdfdk1vxR07V_r7Y-aLjMyqwBaSqxneFokM", "token_type": "Bearer", "expires_in": 3600, "refresh_token":"dfkdjkkdjfdfrrdkfjd9984maWbrIrXqNNK63SOzJdWQGaTYQGD6Ji1dWsAywEgm-eUspfuOlug8f71XL2oBWtD_pzd6EzCWwqCVnDSWspbJelOwVDY62TuAI", "scope": "user-read-currently-playing user-top-read user-read-private"
}

That's a lot to digest, but now our work is done, we have all the necessary things we needed for authorization.

Setting up Environment Variables

Now all the things we get in the above process we need to add those to the .env.local

SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID=
SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET=
SPOTIFY_REFRESH_TOKEN=

Using Spotify API

Now we can use the refresh_token to get the final access_token. The following Code fetches the access_token by using the refresh_token

// lib/spotify.js const getAccessToken = async () => { const refresh_token = process.env.SPOTIFY_REFRESH_TOKEN; const response = await fetch("https://accounts.spotify.com/api/token", { method: "POST", headers: { Authorization: `Basic ${Buffer.from( `${process.env.SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID}:${process.env.SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET}` ).toString("base64")}`, "Content-Type": "application/x-www-form-urlencoded", }, body: new URLSearchParams({ grant_type: "refresh_token", refresh_token, }), }); return response.json();
};

Fetch the Top Tracks

Now you can use this access_token fetch your data. In our case it is the top tracks.

// lib/spotify.js export const topTracks = async () => { const { access_token } = await getAccessToken(); return fetch("https://api.spotify.com/v1/me/top/tracks", { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${access_token}`, }, });
};

Creating API route top tracks

In the beginning, I mentioned that we are going to use the Next.js API routes. If you are not familiar with that then give this a read

// pages/api/stats/tracks.js import { topTracks } from "../../../lib/spotify"; export default async function handler(req, res) { const response = await topTracks(); const { items } = await response.json(); const tracks = items.slice(0, 5).map((track) => ({ title: track.name, artist: track.artists.map((_artist) => _artist.name).join(", "), url: track.external_urls.spotify, coverImage: track.album.images[1], })); res.setHeader( "Cache-Control", "public, s-maxage=86400, stale-while-revalidate=43200" ); return res.status(200).json(tracks);
}

This will return the first five top tracks, I've removed unnecessary information. You can modify this as you like. Now visit the localhost:3000/api/stats/tracks. If everything worked correctly, you should see some data like this -

// localhost:3000/api/stats/tracks [ // ........... { "title": "Blowing Up", "artist": "KR$NA", "url": "https://open.spotify.com/track/3Oh2FwWbnKIAyUE2gToFYu", "coverImage": { "height": 300, "url": "https://i.scdn.co/image/ab67616d00001e02f8c35169d5bab01327f87e5a", "width": 300 } }, { "title": "Jaan Bolti Hai", "artist": "Karma", "url": "https://open.spotify.com/track/4KGZlLtfKV4raRbsoB2Rw9", "coverImage": { "height": 300, "url": "https://i.scdn.co/image/ab67616d00001e028e3626063a42b11b847663b3", "width": 300 } }, //.........
]

To see my stats you can visit https://jatin.vercel.app/api/stats/tracks.

Fetch the Top Artist

Now you can use this access_token fetch your data. In our case it is the top artists.

// lib/spotify.js export const topArtists = async () => { const { access_token } = await getAccessToken(); return fetch("https://api.spotify.com/v1/me/top/artists", { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${access_token}`, }, });
};

Creating API route top artists 

// pages/api/stats/artists.js import { topArtists } from "../../../lib/spotify"; export default async function handler(req, res) { const response = await topArtists(); const { items } = await response.json(); const artists = items.slice(0, 5).map((artist) => ({ name: artist.name, url: artist.external_urls.spotify, coverImage: artist.images[1], followers: artist.followers.total, })); res.setHeader( "Cache-Control", "public, s-maxage=86400, stale-while-revalidate=43200" ); return res.status(200).json(artists);
}

It returns your's top Spotify artists.

Fetch the Currently Playing Song

Now, as you can see on my website's footer there is an option to see if I am currently playing the song or not, if yes then which one. To do that, we fetch the following URL.

// lib/spotify.js export const currentlyPlayingSong = async () => { const { access_token } = await getAccessToken(); return fetch("https://api.spotify.com/v1/me/player/currently-playing", { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${access_token}`, }, });
};

Creating API route for Currently Playing Song 

// pages/api/now-playing.js import { currentlyPlayingSong } from "../../lib/spotify"; export default async function handler(req, res) { const response = await currentlyPlayingSong(); if (response.status === 204 || response.status > 400) { return res.status(200).json({ isPlaying: false }); } const song = await response.json(); if (song.item === null) { return res.status(200).json({ isPlaying: false }); } const isPlaying = song.is_playing; const title = song.item.name; const artist = song.item.artists.map((_artist) => _artist.name).join(", "); const album = song.item.album.name; const albumImageUrl = song.item.album.images[0].url; const songUrl = song.item.external_urls.spotify; res.setHeader( "Cache-Control", "public, s-maxage=60, stale-while-revalidate=30" ); return res.status(200).json({ album, albumImageUrl, artist, isPlaying, songUrl, title, });
}

This returns all the song details if the user is playing the song. Otherwise, isPlaying will return false. You can handle both the conditions now. If the user is playing the song, then simply show the song Otherwise Display Not Playing.

You should use swr to fetch the data Otherwise it will show you the old data which you might not like.

Output

You can view the Example of this on my website

Wrapping Up

If you enjoyed this article then don't forget to press ❤️. If you have any queries or suggestions don't hesitate to drop them. See you.

You can extend your support by buying me a Coffee.😊👇
item.author: j471n

item.title: 我是什么 ？？？ | What I am ???
item.description:
沙米沙玛

发表于大家好，我很高兴加入这个了不起的社区。 在过去 5 年左右的时间里，我是一名网页设计师、平面设计师、前端开发人员（html、css、js），但老实说，我在这里感觉自己像个菜鸟。 经过这么长时间，我真的不知道我在这个领域的立场。 如果我认为自己是一名设计师，那么除了 Photoshop、Illustrator、CSS 我什么都不知道。 至于考虑自己是一名开发人员，我只了解 html css 和一点 js（所以这让我成为了一个 ultranoob）。 当我看着其他设计师或开发人员时，我感到不知所措，好像他们知道的太多了，而我却离他们很远。 有时它对我来说太令人沮丧了。 我真的不知道我该怎么办。 有没有人经历过同样的事情！ 请告诉我。 任何建议/帮助将不胜感激🙂谢谢并期待这次开发之旅👍🏻



原文:

shammisharma

Posted on May 12

Hello everyone, I'm glad to joint this amazing community. I am a web designer, graphic designer, front end developer (html,css,js) for past 5 years or so but to be honest I'm feeling like a noob here. (image for context 😅). I seriously don't know where I stand in this field after this long time. If I consider myself a designer then besides photoshop, illustrator, css I know nothing. As for considering myself a developer I only have a knowledge of html css , bit of js (so that makes me a ultranoob). When I look at other designers or devs I feel so overwhelmed like whoa they know so much and I'm nowhere near them. Sometimes its so depressing for me. I seriously don't know what should I do. Have any of guys been through same ! kindly let me know. Any advice / help will be appreciated 🙂 Thanks and looking forward to this journey on dev 👍🏻
item.author: shammisharma

item.title: 欢迎使用 Flutter 3.0！ | Please Welcome Flutter 3.0!
item.description:
我不敢相信又到了另一个主要的 Flutter 稳定版本的时候了。 是的，大家欢迎 Flutter 3.0。

去年在 Google I/O 上，Flutter 团队发布了Flutter 2.2 。 从那时起，Flutter 有了一些重大改进和稳定版本。 在Invertase ，作为一家开源公司，我们也感谢数百名社区贡献者为 Flutter 所做的所有辛勤工作； 赞一个，大家！ 它展示了 Flutter 的出色表现以及其团队在解决关键问题、升级 Flutter 并将其提升到新水平方面的响应速度。

本文将总结 Flutter 和 Dart 的新功能。

介绍 Flutter 3.0

在 Google I/O 2022 上，Flutter 3.0 发布了！ 让我们来看看这个主要版本有什么新功能！

但是，有一些重要的改进，尤其是在性能方面。

应用生命周期 API

一个新的 API，让您可以完全控制 Flutter 框架、引擎和内容。 这使您可以在 Web 上以无头模式运行 Flutter。 一个示例可能是在显示登录屏幕或进度条时预加载内容！

您可以在gallery.flutter.dev （源代码）上看到这一新变化，您将在其中看到一个放大并加载整个应用程序的初始屏幕。

更快的图像解码和滚动

事实上，Flutter 正在利用浏览器中新的 web-codec API 来改进图像解码，并引入了更好的滚动方式，在解码图像时很有可能获得 60 fps。

在性能选项卡下增强跟踪
  • 网络选项卡上的改进
  • 可折叠设备支持

    材料 3 小部件

    我们都在等待Material 3 ，是的，它已经登陆 Flutter for Android。 这是对 Material 小部件的大规模更新，它使开发人员能够在他们的 Android 应用程序中欢迎 Material You。

    重大变化包括颜色系统改进、排版改进和许多组件的更新。

    自适应颜色

  • 新按钮
  • 新应用菜单
  • 可变字体支持

    • 在 Flutter 3.0 中使用 Material 3 需要做的是通过ThemeData的参数启用它

    return MaterialApp ( theme : ThemeData ( useMaterial3 : true ), // ... );

    增强的平台视图

    让 Flutter 发挥作用

    该项目是一个演示，旨在通过将 Flutter 集成到现有应用程序中来帮助人们测试驱动 Flutter。 此 repo 中包含一个 Flutter add-to-app 模块，其中包含 UI 和逻辑，用于显示弹出窗口以捕获用户反馈（“净推荐分数”）。 除了该模块之外，还有适用于 iOS、Android 和 Web 的三个新闻源应用程序，它们分别使用 SwiftUI、Kotlin 和 Angular 构建。 在此处阅读有关将 Flutter 投入使用的更多信息

    其他更新

    • 混合应用工具包
    • 增强代码 lints
    • 改善桌面可访问性
    • 级联菜单
    • 桌面系统菜单支持
    • 主题扩展
    • 签名的可执行文件
    • 介绍 Dart 2.17

    让我们来看看新功能。

    增强的枚举

    一个大规模的更新已经登陆enum来给他们超级充电。 我们使用杠杆extensions来扩展enums的功能，包括定义方法。 从 Dart 2.17 开始，我们不再需要使用旧模型来处理enum 。

     enum Cars { tesla ( 'Model X' , 200 ); bmw ( 'X6' , 120 ); porsche ( 'Tycon' , 220 ); final String name ; final int price ; const Cars ( this . name , this . price ); String get nameAndPrice => ' $name : $price ' ; String greeting ( String yourName ) { return 'My name is $yourName and I have a $name that costs $price !' ; } @override String toString () { return 'The name is $name and price is $price ' ; } } void main ( ) { print ( Cars . tesla . greeting ( 'Majid' )); print ( Cars . bmw ); print ( Cars . porsche . name ); }

    超级构造函数

    这可能是我最喜欢的代码之一，它可以简化我们的编码，您可以在其中将构造函数参数传递给超类。

    让我们探索一下新语法是什么样的。 我们曾经有如下的旧语法

    class Animal { Animal ( this . name ); final String name ; } // Old way: before Dart 2.17 class Dog extends Animal { Dog ( String name , this . age ) : super ( name ); final int age ; }

    新语法很简单

    class Animal { Animal ( this . name ); final String name ; } // New way: Dart 2.17 and above class Dog extends Animal { Employee ( super . name , this . age ); final int age ; }

    在任何地方命名 args

    以前，我们必须在构造函数的最后一个位置添加名称参数。 从 Dart 2.17 开始，我们不再需要这样做。 您可以将命名参数放在构造函数中的任何位置。

     class Animal { Animal ( this . name ); final String name ; } class Dog extends Animal { Employee ( super . name , { required this . age }); final int age ; void bark () => print ( ' $name is $age year-old and is barking' ); } void main ( ) { Dog ( age: 4 , 'Lucy' ). bark (); }

    下一步是什么？

    我试图总结并给你 Flutter 3.0 的最佳特性。 但是，我建议观看主题演讲并享受精彩的演讲和激动人心的采访。

    您可以阅读Flutter 3和Dart 2.17 简介：生产力和集成博客了解更多信息。

    我相信 Flutter 会继续以更多的特性给我们带来惊喜，我希望作为 Flutter 成功的重要组成部分的 Flutter 社区能够帮助增强 Flutter 生态系统。

    尽管如此，我们 Invertase 的目标是以不同的方式支持 Flutter 社区，并希望改善 Dart 和 Flutter 生态系统。 我们开始填补我们已经认识到的空白，并努力用我们的开源思维和努力来服务。

    事实上，我们已经开始使用 FlutterFire、Melos、Spec 等项目来做这件事，还有更多的项目即将推出！ 在接下来的几周内，我们会为您和 Flutter 社区提供好消息和更新。

    您可以在Twitter 、 Linkedin和Youtube上关注我们以获取我们的最新更新。



    原文:

    I can't believe it's time again for another major Flutter stable release. Yes, everybody, please welcome Flutter 3.0.

    Last year in Google I/O, the Flutter team announced Flutter 2.2. Since then, there have been a few significant improvements and stable releases to Flutter. At Invertase, as an open-source company, we appreciate all the hard work that hundreds of community contributors have done for Flutter, too; kudos, everyone! It shows how great Flutter is performing and how responsive its team is to address critical issues, upgrade Flutter, and take it to the next level.

    This article will summarize what's new in Flutter and Dart.

    Introducing Flutter 3.0

    Flutter is primarily designed to be portable and able to create beautiful apps. Flutter developer tooling focus on making our development process fast and productive.

    At Google I/O 2022, Flutter 3.0 was announced! Let’s take a look at what is new to this major version!

    macOS & Linux are finally stable!

    Windows, Web, Android, and iOS have been stable for a while, and finally, we can welcome macOS and Linux to the list of stable support. Flutter 3 is one of the most significant milestones in the journey of Flutter up to today because Flutter 3.0 supports all six platforms on the stable channel officially.

    Improvement on Flutter Web

    Flutter web has not received many upgrades in this version. However, there are a few significant enhancements, especially for performance.

    App lifecycle API

    A new API that provides you full control over the Flutter framework, engine, and content. This lets you run the Flutter in headless mode on the web. An example could be preloading the content while showing a login screen or a progress bar!

    You can see this new change on the gallery.flutter.dev (source code), where you will see a splash screen that zooms in and loads the entire application.

    Faster image decoding and scrolling

    Flutter 3 for the web comes with a big improvement in image decoding and scrolling, particularly using the Chrome 99+.

    In fact, Flutter is levering the new web-codec API in the browsers to improve decoding images and introduces way better scrolling with a high chance of getting 60 fps while decoding images.

    Flutter DevTools

    Flutter DevTools is a great addition to Flutter that helps to debug any Flutter app as productive as possible. There are a few updates in Flutter DevTools 2.12.2

    • Enhance Tracing under the performance tab
    • Improvement on the Network tab
    • Dedicated plugin for Provider to keep track of change notifier

    Android and iOS updates

    Android and iOS were the leading platforms from the very beginning, and in Flutter 3, they have received a few major upgrades.

    Foldable device support

    Flutter team and Microsoft have collaborated to bring better support for foldable devices.

    Material 3 widgets

    We all have been waiting for Material 3, and YES, it has landed on Flutter for Android. This is a massive update on Material widgets, and it enables developers to welcome Material You for their Android applications.

    Material 3 (also known as Material You) is the next generation of Material Design. The significant changes include color system improvements, typography improvements, and updates for many components.

    The Material 3 widgets in Flutter were introduced with features including

    • Adaptive colors
    • New buttons
    • New app menu
    • Variable font support

    What you need to do to use Material 3 in Flutter 3.0 is to enable it via a parameter to ThemeData

    return MaterialApp( theme: ThemeData(useMaterial3: true), // ... );

    Enhanced platform views

    The platform view support on Android has been re-architected which will make native inline add much smoother.

    Put Flutter to Work

    This project is a demo intended to help people test drive Flutter by integrating it into their existing applications. Included in this repo is a Flutter add-to-app module, which contains the UI and logic for displaying a popup to capture user feedback (a "net promoter score"). Alongside the module are three newsfeed applications for iOS, Android, and web, built with SwiftUI, Kotlin, and Angular, respectively. Read more here about Put Flutter to Work

    *Flutter Casual Games Toolkit*

    Flutter is taking advantage of the hardware-accelerated graphics support provided by Flutter and open source game engines like Flame, making it easier for casual game developers to get started.

    Other updates

    • Hybrid app toolkit
    • Enhance code lints
    • Improve desktop accessibility
    • Cascading menus
    • Desktop system menu support
    • Theme Extensions
    • The simplified release model for iOS
    • CJK desktop support
    • Signed executables
    • Apple Silicon native binaries (read more here)

    Introducing Dart 2.17

    Dart 2.17 stable was announced along with Flutter 3.0 with many long-awaited features that developers have been waiting for. Dart is the secret sauce behind Flutter, and any improvements in Dart would help improve Flutter's development. Let’s take a look at the new features.

    Enhanced Enumerations

    A massive update has landed for enum to super-charge them. We use leverage extensions to extend the functionality of enums including defining methods. Starting from Dart 2.17, we no longer need to use our older model to work with enum .

    enum Cars { tesla('Model X', 200); bmw('X6', 120); porsche('Tycon', 220); final String name; final int price; const Cars(this.name, this.price); String get nameAndPrice => '$name:$price'; String greeting(String yourName) { return 'My name is $yourName and I have a $name that costs $price!'; } @override String toString() { return 'The name is $name and price is $price'; }
} void main() { print(Cars.tesla.greeting('Majid')); print(Cars.bmw); print(Cars.porsche.name);
}

    Super constructors

    This is perhaps one of my favorites that will shorthand our coding, in which you may pass constructor arguments to the superclass.

    Let’s explore what the new syntax looks like. We used to have the old syntax like below

    class Animal { Animal(this.name); final String name;
} // Old way: before Dart 2.17
class Dog extends Animal { Dog(String name, this.age) : super(name); final int age;
}

    The new syntax is straightforward

    class Animal { Animal(this.name); final String name;
} // New way: Dart 2.17 and above
class Dog extends Animal { Employee(super.name, this.age); final int age;
}

    Name args anywhere

    Previously, we had to add name arguments in the last position of the constructor. From Dart 2.17, we no longer need to do that. You can put your named arguments anywhere in the constructor.

    class Animal { Animal(this.name); final String name;
} class Dog extends Animal { Employee(super.name, {required this.age}); final int age; void bark() => print('$name is $age year-old and is barking');
} void main() { Dog(age: 4, 'Lucy').bark();
}

    What’s next?

    I have tried to summarize and give you the best features of Flutter 3.0. However, I recommend watching the keynote and enjoying the excellent presentations and exciting interviews.

    You can read Introducing Flutter 3 and Dart 2.17: Productivity and integration blogs for more information.

    I am sure that the Flutter continues to surprise us with way more features in the features, and I am hoping that the Flutter community, which is a big part of the Flutter's success, can help enhance the Flutter ecosystem.

    Nonetheless, we at Invertase aim to support the Flutter community in different ways and hope to improve the Dart and Flutter ecosystem. We started filling in the gaps that we have recognized and strive to serve with our open-source mindset and efforts.

    In fact, we have already started doing that with projects such as FlutterFire, Melos, Spec, and more are to come! We have fantastic news and updates for you and the Flutter community in the upcoming weeks.

    You may follow us on Twitter, Linkedin, and Youtube to get our latest updates.
item.author: mhadaily

item.title: 快速排序 | Quick Sort
item.description:
我们对快速排序了解多少？

  • 通常递归实现
  • 改变原始数组
  • 类似于反转二叉树的心智模型
  • 类似于 合并排序
  • 这是一种分治算法
  • 它包括2个功能
    • 左右半部分通过数组索引确定
  • 第二个辅助函数进行交换并返回新的枢轴索引
    • 按照惯例，最后一个值是要与之比较的枢轴值
    • 如果当前循环索引的值小于枢轴值
    • 增量
    • 在枢轴左侧变小
    • 枢轴右侧较大
    • 最后，返回枢轴点
  • 我在网上找到的最佳视频解释：
    • 对数组进行排序（快速排序）
  • 时间复杂度：
    • 最佳：O(n^2)
    • 平均：O(nlogn)
    • 最差：O(nlogn)
  • 空间复杂度：
 // 27, 18, 6, 21, 26, 24 // | // i // | // pivotIndex // | // pivotValue function getPivotPoint ( arr , start , end ) { // by convention we always pick the last element as pivot let pivotValue = arr [ end ]; // pivot index should at the end hold the larger value compared to pivot let pivotIndex = start ; for ( let i = start ; i < end ; i ++ ) { // as loing as values on the left of the pivot is smaller in value, // we swap the index with the latest updated pivot index if ( arr [ i ] < pivotValue ) { if ( i !== pivotIndex ) { [ arr [ i ], arr [ pivotIndex ]] = [ arr [ pivotIndex ], arr [ i ]]; } pivotIndex ++ ; } } // swap the latest updated pivot index with the pivot value itself // everything on the right is now larger value than the pivot value [ arr [ end ], arr [ pivotIndex ]] = [ arr [ pivotIndex ], arr [ end ]]; // return new pivot point return pivotIndex ; } function QuickSort ( arr , start = 0 , end = arr . length - 1 ) { // base case if ( end > start ) { const pivot = getPivotPoint ( arr , start , end ); QuickSort ( arr , start , pivot - 1 ); // do the pivot swap on the left QuickSort ( arr , pivot + 1 , end ); // do the pivot swap on the right } return arr ; }

Jan Schenk (he/him) - Jan Schenk (他/他) - May 9 5月9日



原文:

What do we understand about Quick Sort?

  • Usually implemented recursively
  • Mutates the original Array
  • Similar mental model to reversing a Binary Tree
  • Similar to Merge Sort
  • It is a Divide & Conquer algorithm
  • It comprises of 2 functions
    • Main function recursively splits the Array into left and right halves
    • Left and right half is determined via Array index
  • 2nd helper function does the swap and returns the new pivot index
    • by convention, last value is the pivot value to be compared with
    • if current loop index's value is less than pivot value
    • increment
    • smaller to the left of the pivot
    • bigger to the right of the pivot
    • lastly, return the pivot point
  • Best video explanation I found online:
    • NeetCode - LEETCODE 912 (JAVASCRIPT) | SORT AN ARRAY (QUICK SORT)
  • Time Complexity:
    • Best : O(n^2)
    • Average: O(nlogn)
    • Worst : O(nlogn)
  • Space Complexity: 
// 27, 18, 6, 21, 26, 24
// |
// i
// |
// pivotIndex
// |
// pivotValue function getPivotPoint(arr, start, end) { // by convention we always pick the last element as pivot let pivotValue = arr[end]; // pivot index should at the end hold the larger value compared to pivot let pivotIndex = start; for (let i = start; i < end; i++) { // as loing as values on the left of the pivot is smaller in value, // we swap the index with the latest updated pivot index if (arr[i] < pivotValue) { if (i !== pivotIndex) { [arr[i], arr[pivotIndex]] = [arr[pivotIndex], arr[i]]; } pivotIndex++; } } // swap the latest updated pivot index with the pivot value itself // everything on the right is now larger value than the pivot value [arr[end], arr[pivotIndex]] = [arr[pivotIndex], arr[end]]; // return new pivot point return pivotIndex;
}
function QuickSort(arr, start = 0, end = arr.length - 1) { // base case if (end > start) { const pivot = getPivotPoint(arr, start, end); QuickSort(arr, start, pivot - 1); // do the pivot swap on the left QuickSort(arr, pivot + 1, end); // do the pivot swap on the right } return arr;
}

Jan Schenk (he/him) - May 9
item.author: henryong92

item.title: JavaScript 技术面试题 1 | JavaScript Technical Interview Questions 1
item.description:
艾莉亚克里希纳

发表于问：在 HTML 文档中，您将 JavaScript 代码放在哪里？

Inside the <head> element
In the <footer> element
Inside the <script> element
Inside the <link> element

答案 - Inside the <script> element

问：什么运算符用于为已声明的变量赋值？

Colon (:)
Equal sign (=)
Question mark (?)
Double-equal (==)

答案 - Equal sign (=)

问：JavaScript 中的六种原始数据类型是什么？

  • 字符串、数字、布尔值、bigInt、符号、未定义
  • 句子、浮点数、数据、bigInt、符号、未定义
  • 句子，int，truthy，bigInt，符号，未定义

答案 - `string, number, boolean, bigInt, symbol, undefined

问：&& 和 || 有什么区别？

The logical operator && returns true if none of the expressions are true while the logical operator || returns true if one expression or the other returns true.

The logical operator && returns true if both expressions are true while the logical operator || returns true if one expression or the other returns true.

The logical operator && returns true if one expression is true while the logical operator || returns true if both expressions return true.

The logical operator && returns true if both expressions are true while the logical operator || returns false if one expression or the other returns true. 回答 -

The logical operator && returns true if both expressions are true while the logical operator || returns true if one expression or the other returns true.

问：我们如何在 JavaScript 中声明条件语句？

for loop
while loop
if...else
difference...between

回答 -
if...else

问：从给定的数组中，字母“b”在哪个索引上？ 答案 - 1

问：我们如何阻止循环无限重复？

  • 我们必须使用 break 关键字显式结束循环。
  • 当条件为真时，循环将停止执行。
  • 当条件为假时，循环将停止执行。
  • 当我们迭代了一半的条件时。

答案 - A loop will stop executing when the condition is false.

Gabriel_Silvestre - Gabriel_Silvestre - May 9 5月9日



原文:

Arya Krishna

Posted on May 12

Q. Inside the HTML document, where do you place your JavaScript code?

Inside the <head> element
In the <footer> element
Inside the <script> element
Inside the <link> element

Answer - Inside the <script> element

Q. What operator is used to assign a value to a declared variable?

Colon (:)
Equal sign (=)
Question mark (?)
Double-equal (==)

Answer - Equal sign (=)

Q. What are the six primitive data types in JavaScript?

  • string, number, boolean, bigInt, symbol, undefined
  • sentence, float, data, bigInt, symbol, undefined
  • string, num, falsy, bigInt, symbol, undefined
  • sentence, int, truthy, bigInt, symbol, undefined

Answer - `string, number, boolean, bigInt, symbol, undefined

Q. What is the difference between && and ||?

The logical operator && returns true if none of the expressions are true while the logical operator || returns true if one expression or the other returns true.

The logical operator && returns true if both expressions are true while the logical operator || returns true if one expression or the other returns true.

The logical operator && returns true if one expression is true while the logical operator || returns true if both expressions return true.

The logical operator && returns true if both expressions are true while the logical operator || returns false if one expression or the other returns true. Answer -

The logical operator && returns true if both expressions are true while the logical operator || returns true if one expression or the other returns true.

Q. How do we declare a conditional statement in JavaScript?

for loop
while loop
if...else
difference...between

Answer -
if...else

Q. From the given array which index is the letter 'b' on? ['a', 'b', 'c', 'd']

0 3 2

1

Answer - 1

Q. How do we stop a loop from from repeating indefinitely?

  • We have to explicitly end the loop with the break keyword.
  • A loop will stop executing when the condition is true.
  • A loop will stop executing when the condition is false.
  • When we have iterated through half of the condition.

Answer - A loop will stop executing when the condition is false.

Gabriel_Silvestre - May 9
item.author: aryakris

item.title: “欢迎来到网络教育时代” | 'Welcome to the Era of Cyber-Education'
item.description:
社会存在的某些其他元素可以添加到这一点，你可能不会立即考虑的事情：“友谊”、“经验”和“成长”。

个人条件是这里的关键，没有一个外部因素可以真正释放潜力。

互联网的兴起，以及它的泡沫，使自学者能够学到比人类历史上任何时候都多的东西。 是的，这也适用于必须或技术学位。

欢迎来到网络教育时代，在这个时代，Youtube 显示最好的教授一生中做过的最好的讲座，只需点击一个按钮。该平台还向世界上任何人免费提供知识，就像 Twitter 提供的一样交易者、投资者、思想家的免费阿尔法……

在许多方面，Vitalik 是证明规则的例外，加密是一个野蛮的空间，年轻的神童可能与儿童演员有类似的问题。 这是一个有争议的话题，应该引起公众的注意。

总体而言，这取决于成熟度、个性、公司精神、期望、内部与外部压力……所有这些都会导致不同的结果。 只需一点点运气，您就会找到志同道合的建设者，帮助您摆脱“专业主义”的牢笼。 在很多方面，“专家主义”是一种已经感染现代生活许多角落的疾病，传统媒体网站就是最好的例子。

但是生产力游戏比这更复杂。 无所不知的批评家也在信息时代渴望知识，他们只是没有所需的知识。 他们自称的胜利远非真实。

没有人关心权威的徽章，特别是在这个时代，最有影响力的社交媒体网站的自由言论在显示出自己的衰败迹象并证明其所有者错了而不担心被背叛后受到谴责。

在填补我们在任何给定行业中可以发现的空白方面，几乎从未听说过的学位可能不应该占有一席之地。 有时，甚至似乎故意表现出无能。

也许这一切都回到了基本面，为了满足好奇心，为了共同利益的知识，不管观察者和我们为了被观察而描绘的形象。

事实上，当涉及到在旅途中出现的创新和工作角色时，工作准备是不可行的。

编码不是与生俱来的，它只是一套利用思维来解决特定问题的技能。

是的，就是这么简单。 教育不是数字游戏，也不是为了有话要说而互相指责或指责的混乱环境。 安静地工作，让鼓声成为哨子。

此外，在线教学、公开学习或公开错误之间存在着模糊的区别。

并非所有这些都是零和游戏，它们之间几乎没有收益。 任何人都可以通过公开学习进行教学，但与此同时，日记和冲动的记笔记可能会分散无意识模式识别的注意力，这会扼杀直觉并使所有二元决策无效。当心一本书的人。 当心度量标准和统计专家的人。

随着时间的流逝，人们必须乐于将情绪从生活中的决定中移除，并开始考虑无意识地做出的决定的长期后果，无论是以直觉还是冲动的方式。

过多的数据会让自己的头脑充满噪音。 但是也会有不可避免的变化引起的随机噪音，这就是为什么扑克和交易之间的类比只适用于那些从未认真玩过扑克的人。

这也是为什么大多数交易者在他们的模拟账户上表现良好，然后在真金白银受到威胁时却无法执行的原因。

当观众不了解实际产品/想法的全貌时，公开学习是没有意义的。

它忽略了更先进的人的成就和进步，同时诱使新手变得雄心勃勃，在迷失方向的同时犯错。 投资叙事也是如此。

接受一个简单的想法并认真对待它。 认真对待这一点意味着认识到边缘非常有价值。

边缘和阿尔法需要复杂的技能，这样进步的潜力不仅可以被访问，而且任何人都可以学习，无论他们的经济或社会文化条件如何。

分散教育

对公立学校的信心处于历史低点，新一代不再信任过时的旧系统。 在家上学不再潜伏在偏远的懒鬼家中。

学徒制确实是协作，也就是双赢和反馈驱动的体验。 导师制本身并不是要求别人告诉你你必须做什么的借口。 相反，它是避开媒体或有影响力的公司的传统学习方法的全面替代方案。

首先是在线，然后是物理。 这是利用和扩展网络效应潜力的唯一方法。 每个人都直截了当。 如果这就是兔子洞的尽头，你还有什么可失去的？ 其他人错过了，稍后会FOMO。

加密和全职不加起来。 这与时间测量无关，也与时间无关。 这一切都是为了在我们的脑海中建立一个真正的内在元宇宙。

不知道是一维的，3D的，还是4K的，我知道它是发自内心的，我想被志同道合的人包围，不管他们在梦想的土地上买了房子，他们还在他们父母的地方，或者他们是数字游牧民族。

全职会导致误解，是时候继续前进并在将我们的生活变成马拉松的小冲刺中找到学徒了。 可以针对hodlers的极端主义社会运动。 在这个时候杀死引导他们的软件协议似乎是不可行的。网络空间已经有了数字货币，什么时候去中心化教育？ 当一维透明从工作和生活中切换？



原文:

Certain other elements of social existence can add on to this, things you may not immediately consider: “friendships,” “experience,” and “growing up”.

Personal conditions are the key here, and there is no one external factor that truly unlocks the potential one holds.

The rise of the internet, and also its bubble, has enabled autodidacts to learn more than they ever could have in human history. And yes, this also applies to the have-to or technical degrees.

Welcome to the era of cyber-education, an age where Youtube displays the best lectures that the best professors has ever given in a lifetime at the click of a button.The platform also offers knowledge freely to anyone in the world, just like Twitter offering free alpha to traders, investors, thinkers…

In many ways, Vitalik was the exception that proved the rule, crypto is a savage space where young prodigies are likely to have similar issues to child actors. It is a controversial topic that should be brought to the public attention.

Overall, it depends on maturity, personality, company ethos, expectations, internal vs external pressure… all of that leading to different outcomes. The recruitment process in Crypto is doomed, but there is no other way around it.

Just a pinch of luck and you will find like-minded builders that will help you run away from the cage of “expertism”. In many ways, “expertism” is a disease that has already infected many corners of modern life, and traditional media sites are the best example.

But the productivity game is way more involved than that. The know-all critics are also starving for knowledge in the information era, they just don’t have what it takes. Their self-proclaimed victory is far from being true.

Nobody cares about the badge of authority, specially in an era where freedom-speech pitches for the most influential social media site are reprimanded after showing its own signs of decay and proving its owners wrong without fear of betrayal.

Almost-never heard degrees perhaps don’t deserve a place when it comes to filling the gaps that we can detect in any given industry. Sometimes, it even appears that incompetence is shown on purpose.

Maybe it all goes back to the fundamentals, to the shared common good of knowledge for the sake of curiosity satisfaction, regardless of observers and the image we portray for the sake of being observed.

Job preparation, indeed, is just not viable when it comes to innovation and job roles that appear on the go.

Coding is not innate, it is just a set of skills that leverage thinking with the goal of solving a certain problem.

Yes, it is that simple. Education is not a numbers game, neither is it a chaotic environment of finger-pointing or blaming for the sake of having something to say. Work in silence, and let the drums be the whistle.

Furthermore, there is a blurry difference between teaching online, learning in public, or being wrong in public.

Not all of those are zero-sum games, and they share almost no yield among each other. Anyone can teach by learning in public, but at the same time, journals and impulsive note-taking can be a distraction for unconscious pattern recognition, which kills intuition and invalidates all binary decisions.Beware the man of one book. Beware the man on metrics and experts of statistics.

As time moves on, one has to feel comfortable removing emotions from the way to make decisions in life and start thinking about the long-term consequences of decisions that were made unconsciously, whether in an intuitive or an impulsive manner.

Excess data floods one’s own mind with noise. But there will also be a random noise caused by inevitable variation, that’s why the analogy between poker and trading only works for those who have never played poker seriously.

That’s also the reason why most traders do well on their simulation accounts and then fail to execute when real money is at stake.

In ‘fact,’ part-time traders could do better off not only in health but also in monetary terms compared to the mental pressure reflected by 10 monitors pointing at the tired eyes of a trader.

Learning in public makes no sense when the audience does not have the full picture of the actual product/idea.

It overlooks the achievements and progress of more advanced people while inducing newbies to become ambitious and compound their mistakes while being disoriented. Same for investing narratives.

Take a simple idea and take it seriously. Taking this seriously means recognizing that edges are incredibly valuable.

The edges and alphas require complex skills, such that the potential for progress can be not only accessible, but also learnable for anyone, regardless of their economic or socio-cultural conditions.

Decentralized Education

Confidence in public schools is at historic lows and new generations no longer trust the old antiquated system. Home-schooling is no longer in the lurks at a remote slacker’s house.

Apprenticeship, indeed, is collaboration, aka a win-win and feedback-driven experience. Mentorship, in its own, is not an excuse for asking others to tell you what you have to do. Instead, it is full-blown alternative to the legacy learning methods eschewing media or influential corporations.

Online first, and physical next. That’s the only way to leverage and scale the potential of network effects. Each individual goes straight and to the the point. If that’s the end of the rabbit hole, what is there for you to lose? Others missed it and will FOMO in later.

Crypto and full-time don’t add up. It is not about time measurements, nor is it about timing. It is all about building a true inner metaverse inside our minds.

I don’t know if it is one-dimensional, 3D, or 4K, I know that it comes from within and I want to be surrounded by like-minded people, whether they bought a house in their dream’s land, they are still at their parents’ place, or they are digital nomads.

Full-time leads to misconceptions, it is time to move on and find apprenticeship in the small sprints that turn our lives into a marathon. One can target the maximalist social movement of the hodlers. Killing the software protocol that guides them seems unfeasible at this point in time.The cyberspace already has a digital currency, when decentralized education? When one-dimensional and transparent switch from work and life?

发表于呜！ 就是这个。 本系列结束。 我们已经看到了很多可以在这些框架之间进行比较的概念。 希望它对人们有所帮助！

看看🚀

反应

现场示例

const [ multiSelected , setMultiSelected ] = useState < string [] > ([ ' Frontend Developer ' , ]); const handleMultiSelected = ( options : any ) => { let selectedOptions = [... options ] . map (( option ) => option . value ) . reduce (( prev , current ) => [ prev , ' , ' , current ]); setMultiSelected ( selectedOptions ); }; < section > < h2 > Multi Select </ h2 > < select multiple style = { { width : ' 100px ' } } onChange = { ( e ) => handleMultiSelected ( e . target . selectedOptions ) } > < option > Frontend Developer </ option > < option > Backend Developer </ option > < option > Fullstack Developer </ option > </ select > < p > Selected: { multiSelected } </ p > </ section >

现场示例

const multiSelected = ref ([ ' Frontend ' ]); < section > < h2 > Multi Select </ h2 > < select v-model = "multiSelected" multiple style = "width: 100px" > < option > Frontend Developer </ option > < option > Backend Developer </ option > < option > Fullstack Developer </ option > </ select > < p > Selected: { { multiSelected } } </ p > </ section >

苗条

现场示例

let multiSelected : string [] = [ ' Frontend Developer ' ]; < section > < h2 > Multi Select </ h2 > < select bind : value = { multiSelected } multiple style = "width: 100px" > < option > Frontend Developer </ option > < option > Backend Developer </ option > < option > Fullstack Developer </ option > </ select > < p > Selected: { multiSelected } </ p > </ section >

Woo ! This is it. The end of this series. We've seen a lot of concepts to compare between these frameworks. Hope it helped people!

Check it out 🚀

React

Live Example

const [multiSelected, setMultiSelected] = useState<string[]>([ 'Frontend Developer',
]);
const handleMultiSelected = (options: any) => {
let selectedOptions = [...options] .map((option) => option.value) .reduce((prev, current) => [prev, ', ', current]); setMultiSelected(selectedOptions);
}; <section> <h2>Multi Select</h2> <select multiple style={{ width: '100px' }} onChange={(e)=> handleMultiSelected(e.target.selectedOptions)} > <option>Frontend Developer</option> <option>Backend Developer</option> <option>Fullstack Developer</option> </select> <p>Selected: {multiSelected}</p>
</section>

Vue

Live Example

const multiSelected = ref(['Frontend']); <section> <h2>Multi Select</h2> <select v-model="multiSelected" multiple style="width: 100px"> <option>Frontend Developer</option> <option>Backend Developer</option> <option>Fullstack Developer</option> </select> <p>Selected: {{ multiSelected }}</p>
</section>

Svelte

Live Example

let multiSelected: string[] = ['Frontend Developer']; <section> <h2>Multi Select</h2> <select bind:value={multiSelected} multiple style="width: 100px"> <option>Frontend Developer</option> <option>Backend Developer</option> <option>Fullstack Developer</option> </select> <p>Selected: {multiSelected}</p>
</section>

item.title: 使用 ruby​​ 的 Ferrum gem 自动生成 Jekyll 卡片 | Automating Jekyll card generation with ruby’s Ferrum gem
item.description:
我现在有了一种简单的、仅使用 ruby​​ 的自动化方法来制作Twitter 摘要卡和此博客上帖子的OpenGraph 图像预览。 现在我只需要迭代它们当前可怕的零版本外观！

从历史上看，您会使用 javascript 调用Puppeteer驱动无头 Chrome 实例来生成屏幕截图。 我是怎么做到的

在我的Jekyll安装中，我有一个指向我的_posts目录的_cards符号链接，在我的_config.yml中，我有一个如下所示的defaults部分：

 defaults: - scope: path: "_posts" values: layout: post - scope: path: "_cards" values: layout: card

您需要这样做，以便您的帖子不指定layout: post在他们各自的frontmatter中。 如果他们这样做了，这将覆盖我们需要cards集合使用的layout: card ，我们最终会得到整个页面的屏幕截图。

所以现在有一个cards集合反映了我的帖子，但它使用自己的_layouts/cards.html布局呈现。 我用它来生成帖子图像。

由于符号链接，像_posts/cards/automating-jekyll-card-generation-with-ruby-ferrum.md这样的每个_post条目都会有一个对应的/cards/<publish date>-automating-jekyll-card-generation-with-ruby-ferrum.html运行 jekyll jekyll serve或 jekyll jekyll build时的页面。 正是这些页面，我们将指向 Chrome 以生成图像。

将 Ferrum gem 添加到我的Gemfile ，我可以使用这个 ruby​​ 为我的帖子制作图像：

 require "Rubygems" require "Ferrum" def generate_card(browser, card, png, options={}) browser.go_to("http://localhost:4000/cards/#{card}") # see all the options here https://github.com/rubycdp/ferrum#screenshots browser.screenshot(path: "./images/cards/#{png}", full: true, # final image size is window_size x scale scale: 2) end browser = Ferrum::Browser.new(window_size: [800, 418]) # Check what cards we need to make Dir.glob("_posts/*").each do |post| post = File.basename(post, ".md") png = post + ".png" card = post + ".html" generate_card(browser, card, png) unless File.exists?("./images/cards/#{png}") end

这将使用您本地版本的 jekyll 站点来创建屏幕截图。 为了确保它正在运行，并且对于许多其他任务，我使用了Makefile 。 这是一个简化版本：

 default: deploy clean-site: # Do this step to ensure we don't accidentally publish drafts etc rm -rf _site # JEKYLL_ENV=production to avoid localhost urls in your jekyll-seo-tag links serve-site: JEKYLL_ENV=production jekyll serve & echo $$! > /tmp/jekyll.pid && sleep 15 build-cards: serve-site ruby ./scripts/generate-cards.rb kill -9 $(shell cat /tmp/jekyll.pid) rm -f /tmp/jekyll.pid deploy: build-cards rsync --progress --delete -a -e ssh _site/ gooby.org:~/jay.gooby.org/public

因为它是默认配方，所以我可以在我的项目的根目录中调用make来让网站上线。



原文:

I’ve now got a simple, ruby-only, automated way of making Twitter summary cards and OpenGraph image previews for the posts on this blog. Now I just need to iterate on the currently horrible version-zero look of them!

Historically you would have done this using javascript calling Puppeteer driving a headless Chrome instance to generate the screenshot. Mikkel Hartmann has a great write up of doing it this way.

Ruby now has the awesome Ferrum gem which uses the Chrome DevTools Protocol to control Chrome, so you can drop the need for JS.

How I did it

In my Jekyll install I’ve got a _cards symbolic link to my _posts directory, and in my _config.yml I’ve got a defaults section that looks like this:

defaults:
  -
    scope:
      path: "_posts"
    values:
      layout: post  
  -
    scope:
      path: "_cards"
    values:
      layout: card

You need to do this so your posts don’t specify layout: post in their individual frontmatter. If they did, this would override the layout: card that we need the cards collection to use, and we’d just end up with a screenshot of the entire page.

So there’s now a cards collection that mirrors my posts, but that render with their own _layouts/cards.html layout. I use this to generate the post image from.

Because of the symbolic link, every _post entry like _posts/cards/automating-jekyll-card-generation-with-ruby-ferrum.md will have a corresponding /cards/<publish date>-automating-jekyll-card-generation-with-ruby-ferrum.html page when you run jekyll serve or jekyll build. It’s these pages we’ll point Chrome at to generate the images.

After adding the Ferrum gem to my Gemfile, I can use this ruby to make images for my posts:

require "Rubygems"
require "Ferrum"

def generate_card(browser, card, png, options={})
  browser.go_to("http://localhost:4000/cards/#{card}")
  # see all the options here https://github.com/rubycdp/ferrum#screenshots
  browser.screenshot(path: "./images/cards/#{png}",
                     full: true,
                     # final image size is window_size x scale
                     scale: 2)
end

browser = Ferrum::Browser.new(window_size: [800, 418])

# Check what cards we need to make
Dir.glob("_posts/*").each do |post|

  post = File.basename(post, ".md")
  png = post + ".png"
  card = post + ".html"

  generate_card(browser, card, png) unless File.exists?("./images/cards/#{png}")
end

This will use your local version of the jekyll site to create the screenshots from. To ensure it’s running, and for a bunch of other tasks, I use a Makefile. Here’s a simplified version:

default: deploy

clean-site:
# Do this step to ensure we don't accidentally publish drafts etc
    rm -rf _site

# JEKYLL_ENV=production to avoid localhost urls in your jekyll-seo-tag links
serve-site:
     JEKYLL_ENV=production jekyll serve & echo $$! > /tmp/jekyll.pid && sleep 15

build-cards: serve-site
    ruby ./scripts/generate-cards.rb
    kill -9 $(shell cat /tmp/jekyll.pid)
    rm -f /tmp/jekyll.pid

deploy: build-cards
    rsync --progress --delete -a -e ssh _site/ gooby.org:~/jay.gooby.org/public

The deploy recipe cleans the site, serves it, generates the images using the ruby script, then “deploys” the site by copying it to my remote host with rsync. Because it’s the default recipe, I can just call make in the root of my project to get the site live.
item.author: jaygooby

随着技术呈指数级增长，AI whatsapp 聊天机器人成为我们日常生活的重要组成部分。 大多数企业都在使用 AI whatsapp 聊天机器人来与客户沟通并自动化其内部运营。 随着 WhatsApp 和 Facebook 等消息传递平台的发展，whatsapp 聊天机器人现在是商业消息传递和通信的中心。 这种引领潮流的目光落在了 WhatsApp 聊天机器人上。 它可以节省您的时间和现金，并让我们的业务实现数字化转型，从而成为趋势。

随着聊天机器人在过去几年中广泛用于商业交流，脚本化或预定义的聊天机器人表现良好。 尽管如此，人工智能 whatsapp 聊天机器人比仅仅轰炸执行的答案要强大得多。 自然语言处理 (NLP) 通过 AI whatsapp 聊天机器人为会话消息增添了人文气息。 通过 NLP，我们可以训练 whatsapp 聊天机器人进行多种交易和响应。 在 whatsapp 聊天机器人中使用 NLP 可以使其获得更广泛的影响力和参与度，值得使用。

挖掘客户的期望并据此进行回复等。

在提供出色的客户服务方面，NLP 具有很大的优势和优势。 在您的业务中使用基于 NLP 的 WhatsApp 机器人可以帮助您吸引适当的追随者并产生巨大的品牌价值。 为您的业务开发基于 NLP 的 WhatsApp 聊天机器人，并为您的目标追随者提供智能服务以发展您的业务。 您可以通过info@askeva.in与我们联系，或访问我们的网站www.askeva.in ，了解有关 whatsapp 聊天机器人和 NLP、AI 和 ML 等先进技术的更多信息。

Each and every query and requirement will be unique and written in a manner that your general whatsapp chatbot might not be able to understand. NLP has great advantages and benefits when it comes to delivering great client service. item.title: Javascript短裤：空和未定义 | Javascript Shorts : null and undefined
item.description:
大家好，在这篇博客中，我们将看到关于 javascript 的两个著名的原语null和undefined 。

什么是空？

表示有意不存在任何对象值的原始值。 什么是未定义？

未为变量分配任何值时的原语。 为什么 typeof null 是一个对象？

让我们试着理解为什么当我们记录 typeof undefined我们得到undefined而当我们记录 typeof null 我们得到一个object 。 由于null是具有原始类型Null的原始值，为什么不是Null类型。

在早期的 javascript 实现中，值以 32 位单位存储。 前三位 (1 - 3) 位用于识别值的类型，其余 29 位包含实际值。

有 5 个类型标签，其中对象的类型标签为000 。 在大多数平台中，null 表示为NULL指针（0x00）。 这松散地翻译null也有0类型标记，它是"object”的类型。

更多关于 typeof null 代码的信息：参考

在 JavaScript 的第一个实现中，JavaScript 值表示为类型标记和值。 对象的类型标签是0 。 因此， null有0作为类型标记，因此typeof返回值"object" 。 提出了针对 ECMAScript 的修复（通过选择加入），但被拒绝了。 它会导致typeof null === 'null' 。

关于 null 和 undefined 的有趣事实：

他们既平等又不平等。 我是什么意思

console . log ( null === undefined ) // false

当我们使用 javascript 的严格相等运算符进行检查时，我们将得到 false，因为null 和 undefined的类型不同。

 console . log ( null == undefined ) // true

语言规范说，当我们使用松散相等运算符检查null和undefined之间的相似性时，它应该是正确的。

如果我尝试添加null和number怎么办？ 当我们尝试添加undefined和 number 时，我们将得到NaN.

 console . log ( 1 + undefined ) // NaN

结论

差不多就是这样。 感谢您花时间阅读博客文章。 如果您发现该帖子有用，请添加❤️，如果我错过了什么，请在评论部分告诉我。

欢迎在博客上提供反馈。

社交链接：

推特
展示柜

参考资料和资源：

  1. 空与未定义
  2. 松散的等式比较
  3. Falsy - MDN docs Falsy - MDN 文档


原文:

Hello everyone, In this blog we will be seeing about the javascript’s two famous primitives null and undefined.

What is null ?

primitive value that represents the intentional absence of any object value. - ECMA - 262

  • javascript never assigns a null value unless and until it is intentionally assigned.
  • null is considered as a falsy value as it represents there is no value present. 

let a = null; console.log(a) // null
console.log(typeof null) // object
console.log(!!a) // false

What is undefined ?

primitive when a variable has not been assigned any value. - ECMA - 262

undefined is where we declare a variable but not assign any value to it.

let a; console.log(a) // undefined
console.log(typeof a) // "undefined"

Why typeof null is an object ?

let’s try to understand why when we log the typeof undefined we get undefined and when we log the typeof null we get an object . Since null is a primitive value with a primitive type Null why not the type as Null .

Typeof operator returns the type of variable in the form of string.

typeof null === 'object';

In the earlier implementation of javascript, values are stored in 32bit units. first three bits ( 1 - 3 ) bits for identifying the type of the value and rest of 29 bits contained the actual value.

There was 5 type tags in which object had type tag of 000. In most of the platforms , null was represented as the NULL pointer which ( 0x00 ). This loosely translates that null also has 0 type tag which is type of "object”.

More info with code on the typeof null : reference

MDN Reference

In the first implementation of JavaScript, JavaScript values were represented as a type tag and a value. The type tag for objects was 0. null was represented as the NULL pointer (0x00 in most platforms). Consequently, null had 0 as type tag, hence the typeof return value "object". (reference)

A fix was proposed for ECMAScript (via an opt-in), but was rejected. It would have resulted in typeof null === 'null'.

Interesting facts on null and undefined :

they both are equal and not equal. What do I mean by that

console.log(null === undefined) // false

When we use javascript’s strict equality operator to check we will get false as the type of both null and undefined are different.

console.log(null == undefined) // true

Language spec says that when we check for similarities between null and undefined using loose equality operator it is should be true.

What if I try to add null and number. null gets converted to 0 resulting a the number

When we try to add undefined and number we will get NaN.

console.log( 1 + undefined ) // NaN

Conclusion

That's pretty much it. Thank you for taking the time to read the blog post. If you found the post useful , add ❤️ to it and let me know in the comment section if I have missed something.

Feedback on the blog is most welcome.

Social Links:

Twitter
Showwcase

References and Resources:

  1. null vs undefined
  2. loose equality comparison
  3. Falsy - MDN docs
item.author: imkarthikeyan

item.title: 支气管扩张的草药补充剂：草药可以帮助治疗支气管扩张吗？ | Herbal Supplement for Bronchiectasis: Can Herbs Help to Treat Bronchiectasis?
item.description:
支气管扩张

草药补充剂是来自植物的药物，它们在历史上一直被用于治疗人类和动物的各种疾病。 许多草药补充剂已被证明可用于治疗支气管扩张，但由于资金有限，尚未对它们进行太多研究。 在本文中，您将了解更多有关有助于治疗支气管扩张的草药补充剂及其潜在副作用。

支气管扩张的原因

如果婴儿出生时患有支气管扩张，则可能有遗传原因。 如果您或您的家人患有支气管扩张症，您的宝宝患上支气管扩张症的机会就会增加。 其他原因可能包括细菌或病毒感染、胎儿发育和早产（37 周之前）期间的气道问题、某些心脏缺陷、囊性纤维化以及干扰吞咽的情况。 支气管扩张有许多可能的原因，但如果您最近被诊断出，请务必与您的医生讨论其原因，以便您可以立即开始治疗您的症状。

什么是草药？

著名的草药补充剂包括芦荟、紫锥花、金印草和圣约翰草。 这些草药可以药丸或液体形式在保健食品商店或在线零售商处找到。 许多草药是用称为植物化学物质的天然植物化学物质制成的。 研究表明，这些化合物具有很强的抗氧化特性，可以帮助抵抗有害的自由基。 但是，因为它们不受这些联邦机构的监管，所以在开始任何新的治疗计划之前，您应该始终咨询您的医生。 她还想知道您定期服用哪些其他处方药和非处方药，以便她可以确保它们与您的支气管扩张治疗计划的草药治疗之间没有相互作用。

有治疗支气管扩张症的草药补充剂吗？

帮助治疗这些疾病的治疗计划必须个性化，并且可能包括一种或多种草药补充剂。 就治疗支气管扩张症的草药而言，其中一些草药可能具有扩张支气管的作用，而另一些可能会诱导粘液分泌以排出肺部分泌物。 此外，其他类型的补救措施可能侧重于改善肺组织的吸收和促进引流。 虽然许多文化传统上使用草药作为疗法，但并非所有草药疗法都在临床试验中进行了广泛的测试。

草药治疗支气管扩张的安全性和有效性

证据主要限于个别案例的定性报告。 在支气管扩张症患者中，草药补充剂主要用于维持肺部健康和肺功能。 然而，尽管患者的兴趣和益处的轶事说明，目前发表的关于草药治疗支气管扩张症治疗的文献极为有限。 许多用于支气管扩张的草药与潜在肺部疾病患者的不良反应有关，尤其是由皮质类固醇和抗生素引起的免疫抑制……研究重点是提高生活质量，许多其他提议的益处尚未通过研究得到证实研究... 目前关于草药治疗支气管扩张的安全性或有效性的信息不足； 因此，不能推荐这些。 选择使用草药的患者应在合格的执业医师的监督下进行...

如何安全服用草药？

一般来说，在开始任何草药补充剂之前，您应该与您的医生交谈。 然而，有一些草药可能有助于缓解与支气管扩张相关的支气管症状。 在考虑草药疗法时，请务必与知识渊博的医疗保健专业人员合作，因为它们可能会产生副作用或与其他药物相互作用。 一种显示出前景的补充剂是黄芪。 研究表明，它可以通过增加支气管扩张患者的 IL-10 和降低 TNF-α 水平来增强免疫功能并减少炎症。 与往常一样，如果您正在考虑使用这些疗法，请务必先与您的医生讨论！

与其他物质的可能相互作用

与任何物质一样，在服用治疗支气管扩张症的草药补充剂时，您应该注意一些特定的相互作用。 例如，一种常用的治疗支气管炎和其他肺部疾病的草药是款冬。 如果您还服用地高辛或任何与地高辛相互作用的药物，最好不要服用款冬。 否则，您心律不齐的风险可能会显着增加。 此外，如果您使用的是一种名为克拉霉素 (Biaxin) 的抗生素，请注意不要将其与圣约翰草混合使用； 有一些证据表明，这样做实际上可以逆转圣约翰草作为抗生素治疗的效果！

您需要注意的成分

许多草药补充剂和治疗声称可以缓解支气管扩张症状，例如咳嗽、疼痛或呼吸困难。 然而，这些补充剂可能并不总是包含他们所宣传的内容——或者如果他们这样做，您可能需要服用超过推荐的剂量才能获得任何好处。 在为支气管扩张症状服用草药补充剂之前，请务必先咨询医生。 虽然有许多安全的草药可能有助于改善您的支气管扩张治疗计划，但您必须选择在严格质量控制下生产的那些。 如果可能，在选择草药补充剂之前，请咨询专门研究植物补充剂的知名药剂师或自然疗法师。

您如何开始使用草药补充剂治疗支气管扩张症？

如果您对治疗支气管扩张症的草药补充剂感兴趣，最好的选择是与医疗专业人员合作。 通过咨询草药师或自然疗法师，您可以了解您的任何特定草药是否有帮助； 这些专业人员也对什么剂量可能最有效有深入的了解。 他们也可能会推荐其他治疗方法； 也许免疫系统增强剂会有所帮助，或者另一种药物可能更合适。 在寻求支气管扩张的草药治疗时，必须有人密切关注您的整体健康和护理； 通过与医疗专业人员合作，您可以确保正确服用任何草药并避免副作用。

原文:

`

Bronchiectasis

Herbal supplements are medications which come from plants, and they have been used throughout history to treat various illnesses in both humans and animals alike. Many herbal supplements have shown to be useful in the treatment of bronchiectasis as well, but there has not been much research done on them yet due to limited funds. In this article, you will learn more about herbal supplements which can help with the treatment of bronchiectasis, as well as their potential side effects.

The Causes of Bronchiectasis

If a baby is born with bronchiectasis, it may have a genetic cause. If you or someone in your family has bronchiectasis, there’s an increased chance that your baby will develop it. Other causes can include infections with bacteria or viruses, problems in the airways during fetal development and premature birth (before 37 weeks), certain heart defects, cystic fibrosis, and conditions that interfere with swallowing. There are many possible causes of bronchiectasis, but if yours has been diagnosed recently, be sure to talk to your doctor about its cause so you can get started on treating your symptoms right away.

What Are Herbal Medications?

Well-known herbal supplements include aloe vera, echinacea, goldenseal, and St. John’s wort. These herbs can be found in pill or liquid form at health food stores or online retailers. Many herbal medications are made with natural plant chemicals called phytochemicals. Research suggests that these compounds have strong antioxidant properties that can help fight off harmful free radicals. Because they aren’t regulated by either of these federal agencies, though, you should always consult your doctor before starting any new treatment plan. She will also want to know what other prescription and over-the-counter drugs you take on a regular basis so that she can make sure there are no interactions between them and your herbal treatment for bronchiectasis treatment plan.

Are There Herbal Supplement for Bronchiectasis Treatment?

A treatment plan to help with these conditions must be individualized, and would likely include one or more herbal supplement. In terms of Herbs for Bronchiectasis treatment, some of these herbs may offer bronchodilation benefits, while others could possibly induce mucus secretion in order to drain lung secretions. Plus, other types of remedies may focus on improving absorption into lung tissue and facilitating drainage. While herbs have been used traditionally by many cultures as therapies, not all herbal therapies have been tested extensively in clinical trials.

The Safety and Efficacy of Herbs in Bronchiectasis Treatment

The evidence is largely limited to qualitative reports from individual cases. Among bronchiectasis patients, herbal supplement is used primarily for maintaining lung health and lung function. However, despite patient interest and anecdotal accounts of benefit, current published literature on Herbal Treatment for Bronchiectasis treatment is extremely limited. Many Herbs for Bronchiectasis have been associated with adverse effects that may be increased in individuals with underlying lung disease, particularly immunosuppression caused by corticosteroids and antibiotics...Research has focused on improving quality of life, with many other proposed benefits not yet confirmed through research studies... At present there is insufficient information about the safety or efficacy of herbs in bronchiectasis treatment; therefore, these cannot be recommended. Patients who choose to use herbs should do so under the supervision of a qualified practitioner...

How to Take Herbs Safely?

In general, you should speak with your physician before starting any herbal supplements. However, there are some herbs that may help ease bronchial symptoms associated with bronchiectasis. Be sure to work with a knowledgeable healthcare professional when considering herbal remedies as they can have side effects or interactions with other medications. One such supplement that has shown promise is astragalus. Studies show that it can increase immune function and reduce inflammation by increasing IL-10 and decreasing TNF-alpha levels in people with bronchiectasis. As always, be sure to discuss these remedies first with your physician if you're considering using them!

Possible Interactions with Other Substances

As with any substance, there are a few specific interactions you should be aware of when taking Herbal Supplement for Bronchiectasis. For instance, one commonly used herb for treating bronchitis and other lung diseases is coltsfoot. It's best not to take coltsfoot if you are also taking digoxin or any drugs that interact with digoxin. Otherwise, your risk of irregular heartbeats could increase significantly. Additionally, if you're using an antibiotic called clarithromycin (Biaxin), be careful not to combine it with Saint-John's-wort; there is some evidence that doing so can actually reverse how effective Saint-John's-wort is as an antibiotic treatment!

Ingredients You Need to Look Out For

Many herbal supplements and treatments claim to offer relief from bronchiectasis symptoms, such as coughing, pain, or difficulty breathing. However, these supplements may not always contain what they advertise—or if they do, you might need to take more than recommended in order to experience any benefit. Before taking Herbal Supplement for Bronchiectasis symptoms, it’s important that you check with your doctor first. While there are many safe herbs that may be able to help improve your bronchiectasis treatment plan, it’s vital that you select those produced under strict quality control. If possible, consult a reputable pharmacist or naturopath who specializes in a botanical supplement before choosing a herbal supplement.

How Do You Get Started with Herbal Supplement for Bronchiectasis?

If you’re interested in Herbal Supplement for Bronchiectasis treatment, your best bet is to work with a medical professional. By consulting with a herbalist or naturopath, you can find out if any of your specific herbs will be helpful; these professionals also have insights into what dose might be most effective. They may recommend additional treatments as well; maybe an immune system booster would help or perhaps another type of medication would be a better fit. When seeking Herbal Treatment for Bronchiectasis, it's essential that you have someone keeping an eye on your overall health and care; by working together with a medical professional, you can ensure you're taking any herb properly and avoiding side effects.

Publish by: Herbs Solutions by Nature
