item.title: 在 Python 中列出函数 | List Functions in Python
item.description:
您可以将 List 视为 Python 中数组的替代方案。

我们在上一篇文章中已经了解了列表和一些常见的列表操作，如果你错过了，你可以在这里阅读。

现在让我们继续看看 Python 中一些常用且有用的列表函数——

在上一篇文章中，我们看到了如何替换列表中的项目。 在这篇文章中，我们将看到如何将一个项目附加到列表中。

句法

要将项目附加到列表中，您必须在列表名称后使用.append()并将要插入的项目作为参数传递。 让我们通过一个例子更好地理解这一点 -

 # Let's create a list with a few sample colors colors = [ "Red" , "Blue" , "Orange" , "Pink" ] print ( colors ) # Expected output - ['Red', 'Blue', 'Orange', 'Pink'] # Now let's add "Purple" to our list colors . append ( "Purple" ) print ( colors ) # Expected output - ['Red', 'Blue', 'Orange', 'Pink', 'Purple']

解释

  • 在上面的代码中，我们首先创建了一个带有几个颜色名称的颜色列表，并将其打印在控制台上。
  • 然后，我们使用append()函数将紫色添加到我们的列表中，代码如下： colors.append("Purple")
  • 最后，当我们这次使用print语句时，我们得到了Purple以及列表中的其他颜色。

确定列表的长度在 Python 中是一项轻松的任务。 您必须使用len()函数。

句法

让我们看一个例子——

 # Let's create a list with a few sample colors colors = [ "Red" , "Blue" , "Orange" , "Pink" ] print ( len ( colors )) # Expected output - 4

解释

  • 就像前面的代码片段一样，我们首先创建了一个颜色列表。
  • 之后，我们打印了len(colors)函数来知道列表的长度。 要确定列表的长度，您必须在len()函数中传递列表名称。

我们已经看到了如何替换列表中的特定项目。 现在我们将看到，如何在特定位置插入项目。

句法

listname . insert ( index , item )

要在列表的特定位置插入项目，我们必须在列表名称后添加.insert()并将 2 个参数传递给函数 - 我们要插入项目的索引位置和项目本身。 请参阅下面的示例 -

 # Let's create a list with a few sample colors colors = [ "Red" , "Blue" , "Orange" , "Pink" ] print ( colors ) # Expected output - ['Red', 'Blue', 'Orange', 'Pink'] # Now let's add color "Purple" on the index postion 2 colors . insert ( 2 , "Purple" ) print ( colors ) # Expected output - ['Red', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Orange', 'Pink']

解释

  • 创建并打印颜色列表后，我们使用insert()函数在列表中的索引位置 2 上添加颜色Purple 。
  • 我们使用colors.insert(2, "Purple") ，它在第二个索引位置插入了“Purple”。

在某个索引位置插入一个项目不会替换前一个项目，它只会将它和其他后续项目移动到它们的下一个位置。

列表中的每个项目都有一个索引位置。 在处理复杂项目时，您可能需要确定某个值的索引位置。 它可以帮助您识别列表中项目的索引位置。

句法

要识别项目的索引位置，您必须在列表名称后添加.index并将项目作为参数传递。 让我们通过一个例子更好地理解这一点 -

 # Let' create a list with a few sample colors colors = [ "Red" , "Blue" , "Orange" , "Pink" ] # Now let's identify the position of the color "Blue" print ( colors . index ( "Blue" )) # Expected output - 1

解释

  • 在上面的代码中，我们创建了一个颜色列表并在其上使用了index()函数并将“Blue”作为参数传递。
  • 作为回报，代码为我们提供了颜色“蓝色”的索引位置，即 1。

结论

今天的文章就到这里了，我很快就会在另一个 Python 教程中见到你。 本教程和本系列中的所有未来教程都基于The Complete Python Masterclass 。 如果您想详细学习 Python，请查看本课程。

快乐编码！



原文:

List is a data structure in Python which allows you to store multiple items in one place. You can think of List as an alternative to Arrays in Python.

We already learned about lists and some common list operations in our last post, if you missed that, you can read it here.

Now let's move ahead and take look at some of the common and useful list functions in Python-

1. Appending an item

In the previous post, we saw how to replace an item in a list. In this post, we will see how to append an item to the list.

Syntax

To append an item to a list, you have to use .append() after the name of the list and pass the item you want to insert as an argument. Let's understand this better with an example -

# Let's create a list with a few sample colors
colors = ["Red", "Blue", "Orange", "Pink"]
print(colors) # Expected output - ['Red', 'Blue', 'Orange', 'Pink']
# Now let's add "Purple" to our list
colors.append("Purple") print(colors)# Expected output - ['Red', 'Blue', 'Orange', 'Pink', 'Purple']

Explanation

  • In the above code, we first created a color list with a few color names and printed it on the console.
  • Then, we used append() function to add color Purple to our list with the following code - colors.append("Purple")
  • Finally, when we used the print statement this time, we got Purple along with other colors in the list.

2. Find the length of the List

Determining the length of a list is an effortless task in Python. You have to use the len() function.

Syntax

len() function is easy to use, you have to just call the len() and pass the list as an argument. Let's see an example-

# Let's create a list with a few sample colors
colors = ["Red", "Blue", "Orange", "Pink"]
print(len(colors)) # Expected output - 4

Explanation

  • Just like the previous snippet, we first created a color list.
  • After that, we printed the len(colors) function to know the length of the list. To determine the length of a list, you have to pass the list name inside the len() function.

3. Inserting an item in the list

We have already seen how to replace a particular item in the list. Now we will see, how to insert an item in a particular position.

Syntax 

listname.insert(index, item)

To insert an item at a particular position on the list, we have to add .insert() after the name of the list and pass 2 arguments to the function - the index position at which we want to insert our item and the item itself. See the below example -

# Let's create a list with a few sample colors
colors = ["Red", "Blue", "Orange", "Pink"]
print(colors) # Expected output - ['Red', 'Blue', 'Orange', 'Pink']
# Now let's add color "Purple" on the index postion 2
colors.insert(2, "Purple")
print(colors) # Expected output - ['Red', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Orange', 'Pink']

Explanation

  • After creating and printing the color list, we used the insert() function to add the color Purple on the index position 2 in our list.
  • We used colors.insert(2, "Purple") which inserted the "Purple" on the 2nd index position.

Inserting an item on a certain index position does not replace the previous item, it only shifts it and other subsequent items to their next positions.

4. Find the index value of an item

Every item in a list has an index position. When working on a complex project, you may need to determine the index position of a value. The index() function comes to help here. It helps you identify the index position of an item in the list.

Syntax

To identify the index position of an item, you have to add .index after the listname and pass the item as an argument. Let's understand this better with an example-

# Let' create a list with a few sample colors
colors = ["Red", "Blue", "Orange", "Pink"]
# Now let's identify the position of the color "Blue"
print(colors.index("Blue")) # Expected output - 1

Exaplanation

  • In the above code, we created a color list and used the index() function on it and passed "Blue" as an argument.
  • The code in return gave us the index position of the color "Blue", i.e., 1.

Conclusion

That's it for today's post and I will see you soon in another Python tutorial. This tutorial and all the future tutorials in this series are based on The Complete Python Masterclass. Check out this course if you want to learn Python in detail.

Happy Coding!
item.author: ashutoshmishra

item.title: 带有 MVC 应用程序的 .NET highcharts | .NET highcharts with MVC Applications
item.description:
如今，用户更倾向于使用图形、图表、饼图等可视化表示来快速理解数据，而普通的表格无法轻松展示两个或多个数据点之间的重要关系。 因此，ASP.NET MVC 应用程序使用一个名为 .NET highcharts 的 JavaScript 库来实现图表功能，如折线图、面积图、柱形图、条形图、饼图等。

使用 highcharts，我们可以创建许多不同类型的图表。 因此，在本篇博客中，我们将了解如何在 ASP.NET MVC 的服务器端创建 highcharts。 在这里，服务器端意味着将在服务器端和客户端创建的所有内容仅包含显示部分。

第 1 步 - 创建一个 ASP.NET Web 应用程序。

首先，打开 Visual Studio 2017 或任何版本的 Visual Studio，然后单击“文件”并添加，然后选择“新建项目”窗口并选择 ASP.NET Web 应用程序（.NET 框架），然后为项目提供适当的名称像“DemoHighchartswithMVC”，选择你想保存项目的位置，然后点击确定。

第 2 步 - 安装 DotNet.Highcharts 包。

要在 MVC 应用程序中安装 DotNet.Highcharts，您需要右键单击您的项目解决方案资源管理器，然后右键单击您的解决方案文件，然后单击“管理用于解决方案的 NuGet 包”。 选择浏览选项后，它将打开 NuGet 包管理器，您可以从下面给出的搜索文本框中搜索“DotNet.Highcharts”，然后选中项目的复选框并单击安装以添加最新版本的包在你的项目中。

我们还可以通过包管理器控制台安装“DotNet.HighCharts”包。 为此，我们必须转到“工具 -> 菜单”并选择 NuGet 包管理器，然后从中选择“包管理器控制台”。

阅读更多： Asp.NET 中的 Razor 页面与 Mvc

要安装软件包，我们必须输入以下命令：

安装包 DotNet.Highcharts

现在，如果您打开解决方案资源管理器，您将看到 Highcharts 脚本已添加到 Scripts 文件夹中，并且 DotNet.Highcharts 的引用已添加到“参考”部分。

第 3 步 - 在项目中创建 Highcharts

现在，如果您打开解决方案资源管理器，您将看到在项目解决方案文件的 Scripts 文件夹中添加了 Highcharts 脚本文件，并且在 References 部分中添加了 DotNet.Highcharts 的引用。

要使用基本配置进行初始化，首先我将创建一个图表，显示图表的类型、背景颜色、边框等，并为其提供适当的名称。

现在，我们必须为图表定义文本以设置标题和副标题。

例子
barChart.SetTitle(new Title() { Text = "Dravid Vs Ganguly" }); barChart.SetSubtitle(new Subtitle() { Text = "Runs of 10 years(2004-2013)" });

使用 SetXAxis 和 SetYAxis 方法，我们可以定义图表的轴，就像应该在 xAxis 和 yAxis 上呈现的那样。 我们也可以定义轴的标题、类型和类别。

例子
barChart.SetYAxis(new YAxis() { Title = new YAxisTitle() { Text = "Runs", Style = "fontSize: '20px',color: 'green',fontWeight: 'Bold'" }, ShowFirstLabel = true, ShowLastLabel = true, Min = 0 }); barChart.SetXAxis(new XAxis() { Type = AxisTypes.Category, Title = new XAxisTitle() { Text = "Years", Style = "fontSize: '20px',fontWeight: 'bold', " }, Categories = new[] { "2004", "2005", "2006", "2007", "2008", "2009", "2010", "2011", "2012", "2013" } }); barChart.SetLegend(new Legend { Enabled = true, BorderColor = System.Drawing.Color.DarkRed, BorderRadius = 15, BackgroundColor = new BackColorOrGradient(ColorTranslator.FromHtml("#FFADD8E6")) });

现在，我们可以使用 SetSeries() 方法将数据设置为系列，我们必须为数据和系列提供一个名称，用于与系列绑定。

例子
barChart.SetSeries(new Series[] { new Series{ Name = "Rahul Dravid", Data = new Data(new object[] { 128, 429, 628, 425, 459, 772 , 914, 555, 666 ,201}) }, new Series() { Name = "Saurav Ganguly", Data = new Data(new object[] { 921, 157, 281, 1111, 597, 181, 511, 164, 564,304 }) } } ); return View(barChart); }

下面出现的代码是家庭控制器的索引操作方法代码：

例子
using DotNet.Highcharts; using DotNet.Highcharts.Enums; using DotNet.Highcharts.Helpers; using DotNet.Highcharts.Options; using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.Drawing; using System.Linq; using System.Web; using System.Web.Mvc; namespace Asp.NETMVCHighChartsDemo.Controllers { public class HomeController : Controller { public ActionResult Index() { Highcharts barChart = new Highcharts("barchart"); barChart.InitChart(new Chart() { Type = DotNet.Highcharts.Enums.ChartTypes.Bar, BackgroundColor = new BackColorOrGradient(System.Drawing.Color.LightGreen), Style = "fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '17px'", BorderColor = System.Drawing.Color.DarkBlue, BorderRadius = 0, BorderWidth = 2 }); barChart.SetTitle(new Title() { Text = "Dravid Vs Ganguly" }); barChart.SetSubtitle(new Subtitle() { Text = "Runs of 10 years(2004-2013)" }); barChart.SetYAxis(new YAxis() { Title = new YAxisTitle() { Text = "Runs", Style = "fontSize: '20px',color: 'green',fontWeight: 'Bold'" }, ShowFirstLabel = true, ShowLastLabel = true, Min = 0 }); barChart.SetXAxis(new XAxis() { Type = AxisTypes.Category, Title = new XAxisTitle() { Text = "Years", Style = "fontSize: '20px',fontWeight: 'bold', " }, Categories = new[] { "2004", "2005", "2006", "2007", "2008", "2009", "2010", "2011", "2012", "2013" } }); barChart.SetLegend(new Legend { Enabled = true, BorderColor = System.Drawing.Color.DarkRed, BorderRadius = 15, BackgroundColor = new BackColorOrGradient(ColorTranslator.FromHtml("#FFADD8E6")) }); barChart.SetSeries(new Series[] { new Series{ Name = "Rahul Dravid", Data = new Data(new object[] { 128, 429, 628, 425, 459, 772, 914, 555, 666 ,201}) }, new Series() { Name = "Saurav Ganguly", Data = new Data(new object[] { 921, 157, 281, 1111, 597, 181, 511, 164, 564,304 }) } } ); return View(barChart); } } }

第 4 步 - 在 UI 上渲染 highcharts

现在，移动到主控制器的 Index action 方法视图并添加如下所示的代码，然后在 UI 上呈现此条形图。

正在寻找值得信赖的.NET 开发公司？ 您的搜索到此结束。

例子
@model DotNet.Highcharts.Highcharts @{ ViewBag.Title = "Home Page"; }

学到更多

在客户端呈现 Highchart 需要一个 Highcharts.js 文件。 因此，我们必须在 _Layout.cshtml 文件的脚本标签中添加 Highchart.js，如下所示。

例子
<meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

一切都完成后，然后运行 ​​MVC 应用程序。 它将呈现如下条形图。

结论

在这篇博客中，我们看到了使用 ASP.NET MVC 应用程序在服务器端实现“DotNet Highcharts”，这对于制作不同类型的图表，如条形图、柱形图、折线图、饼图、当开发人员希望在客户端以图形、图表等可视化表示形式检查数据时，它很有用。

全栈黑客 - May 5 5月5日



原文:

These days, users are more inclined towards visual representations such as graphs, charts, pie diagrams, etc. to understand the data quickly, which a plain table won’t demonstrate important relationships easily between two or more data points. So, the ASP.NET MVC application uses a JavaScript library called .NET highcharts to implement charting functionality like line charts, area charts, column charts, bar charts, pie charts, etc.

Using highcharts, we can create many different types of charts. So, in this blog, we will see how to create highcharts in the server-side of ASP.NET MVC. Here, server-side means everything that will be created that on the server-side and client-side will contain only displaying part.

STEP 1 - Create an ASP.NET Web Application.

Firstly, Open Visual Studio 2017 or any versions of Visual Studio and then click on “File” and add then select “New Project” windows and choose the ASP.NET Web Application(.NET Framework) and then give the appropriate name to the project like “DemoHighchartswithMVC”, choose the location where you want to save your project and then click on OK.

STEP 2 - Install DotNet.Highcharts Package.

To install DotNet.Highcharts in your MVC application, you need to right-click on your project Solution Explorer and then right-click on your solution file and then click on "Manage NuGet Packages for solution". It will open the NuGet Package Manager after selecting the browse option you can search for the “DotNet.Highcharts” from the search textbox as given below and then select the checkbox of the project and click on the install to add the latest version of the package in your project.

We can also install the “DotNet.HighCharts” package via the Package Manager console. For that, we have to go to "Tools -> menu” and select NuGet Package Manager and then choose “Package Manager Console” from it.

Read More: Razor Pages Vs Mvc In Asp.NET

To install the package, we have to type the following command:

Install-Package DotNet.Highcharts

Now, if you open the Solution Explorer, you will see that Highcharts script is added in Scripts folder and the reference of DotNet.Highcharts is added in the References section.

STEP 3 - Create Highcharts in the project

Now, if you open the Solution Explorer, you will see that Highcharts script file is added in the Scripts folder of the project solution file and the reference of DotNet.Highcharts is added in the References section.

To initialize with basic configuration, first I am going to create a chart that shows the type of a chart, background color, border, etc., and provide an appropriate name for it.

Now, we have to define the text for a chart to set the title and subtitle.

Example 

              barChart.SetTitle(new Title()  
              {  
                  Text = "Dravid Vs Ganguly"  
              });  

              barChart.SetSubtitle(new Subtitle()  
              {  
  Text = "Runs of 10 years(2004-2013)"   
        });

Using the method SetXAxis and SetYAxis, we can define the axis of the chart like what should render on xAxis and yAxis. we can define the title, type, and category of the axis as well.

Example 

            barChart.SetYAxis(new YAxis()
            {
                Title = new YAxisTitle()
                {
                    Text = "Runs",
                    Style = "fontSize: '20px',color: 'green',fontWeight: 'Bold'"
                },
                ShowFirstLabel = true,
                ShowLastLabel = true,
                Min = 0
            });

            barChart.SetXAxis(new XAxis()
            {
                Type = AxisTypes.Category,
                Title = new XAxisTitle() { Text = "Years", Style = "fontSize: '20px',fontWeight: 'bold', " },
                Categories = new[] { "2004", "2005", "2006", "2007", "2008", "2009", "2010", "2011", "2012", "2013" }
            });

            barChart.SetLegend(new Legend  
            {  
                Enabled = true,  
                BorderColor = System.Drawing.Color.DarkRed,  
                BorderRadius = 15,  
                BackgroundColor = new BackColorOrGradient(ColorTranslator.FromHtml("#FFADD8E6"))  
            });

Now, we can use SetSeries() method to set the data with series, where we have to provide a name for data and series which is used to bind with series.

Example 

            barChart.SetSeries(new Series[]  
            {  
                new Series{  

                    Name = "Rahul Dravid",  
                    Data = new Data(new object[] { 128, 429, 628, 425, 459, 772
, 914, 555, 666 ,201})  
                },  
                new Series()  
                {  
                    Name = "Saurav Ganguly",  
                    Data = new Data(new object[] { 921, 157, 281, 1111, 597, 181, 511, 164, 564,304 })  
                }  
            }  
            );  
     return View(barChart);  
        }

The code that appears below is a code of index action method for home controller:

Example 

using DotNet.Highcharts;
using DotNet.Highcharts.Enums;
using DotNet.Highcharts.Helpers;
using DotNet.Highcharts.Options;
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Drawing;
using System.Linq;
using System.Web;
using System.Web.Mvc;

namespace Asp.NETMVCHighChartsDemo.Controllers
{
    public class HomeController : Controller
    {
        public ActionResult Index()
        {
            Highcharts barChart = new Highcharts("barchart");  
            barChart.InitChart(new Chart()  
            {  
                Type = DotNet.Highcharts.Enums.ChartTypes.Bar,  
                BackgroundColor = new BackColorOrGradient(System.Drawing.Color.LightGreen),  
                Style = "fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '17px'",  
                BorderColor = System.Drawing.Color.DarkBlue,  
                BorderRadius = 0,  
                BorderWidth = 2  

            });  

            barChart.SetTitle(new Title()  
            {  
                Text = "Dravid Vs Ganguly"  
            });  

            barChart.SetSubtitle(new Subtitle()  
            {  
Text = "Runs of 10 years(2004-2013)"   
            });

            barChart.SetYAxis(new YAxis()
            {
                Title = new YAxisTitle()
                {
                    Text = "Runs",
                    Style = "fontSize: '20px',color: 'green',fontWeight: 'Bold'"
                },
                ShowFirstLabel = true,
                ShowLastLabel = true,
                Min = 0
            });

            barChart.SetXAxis(new XAxis()
            {
                Type = AxisTypes.Category,
                Title = new XAxisTitle() { Text = "Years", Style = "fontSize: '20px',fontWeight: 'bold', " },
                Categories = new[] { "2004", "2005", "2006", "2007", "2008", "2009", "2010", "2011", "2012", "2013" }
            });

            barChart.SetLegend(new Legend  
            {  
                Enabled = true,  
                BorderColor = System.Drawing.Color.DarkRed,  
                BorderRadius = 15,  
                BackgroundColor = new BackColorOrGradient(ColorTranslator.FromHtml("#FFADD8E6"))  
            });

            barChart.SetSeries(new Series[]  
            {  
                new Series{  

                    Name = "Rahul Dravid",  
                    Data = new Data(new object[] { 128, 429, 628, 425, 459, 772, 914, 555, 666 ,201})  
                },  
                new Series()  
                {  
                    Name = "Saurav Ganguly",  
                    Data = new Data(new object[] { 921, 157, 281, 1111, 597, 181, 511, 164, 564,304 })  
                }  
            }  
            );  

return View(barChart);  
        }  
}
}

STEP 4 - Rendering of highcharts on UI

Now, move to the view of Index action method of home controller and add the code which appears as below and after that render this bar chart on UI.

Looking for Trusted .NET Development Company ? Your Search ends here.

Example 

  @model DotNet.Highcharts.Highcharts
  @{
      ViewBag.Title = "Home Page";
  }

Example of DotNet Highcharts in Asp.Net MVC

Learn More

@(Model)

A Highcharts.js file is required to render Highchart on the client-side. So, we have to add the Highchart.js in the script tag of _Layout.cshtml file as below.

Example 

  <meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

@styles.Render("~/Content/css") @Scripts.Render("~/bundles/modernizr") @Scripts.Render("~/bundles/jquery")

@RenderBody()

© @DateTime.Now.Year - My ASP.NET Application

@Scripts.Render("~/bundles/jquery") @Scripts.Render("~/bundles/bootstrap") @RenderSection("scripts", required: false)

When everything is done, then run the MVC application. It will render a bar chart as following.

Conclusion

In this blog, we have seen the implementation of “DotNet Highcharts” at the server-side by using the ASP.NET MVC application, which is useful for making different types of charts like bar charts, column charts, line charts, pie charts, etc. It is useful when a developer desires to check data in visual representation form like graphs, charts at the client-side.

Full Stack Hacker - May 5

item.title: HTML - What's in the head? HTML - 脑子里有什么？ Metadata in HTML HTML 中的元数据 | HTML - What's in the head? Metadata in HTML
item.description:
它是页面加载时不显示在 Web 浏览器中的部分。 它包含诸如页面<title> 、指向CSS的链接、指向custom favicons图标（最喜欢的图标）的链接等信息， 和其他元数据（有关 HTML 的数据，例如作者、描述文档的重要关键字）。 我们将介绍一些包含在头部中的主要元素。

  • <title>
    这将设置页面的标题，即显示在加载页面的浏览器选项卡中的标题。 页面标题也用于描述被添加书签的页面。 此内容也用于搜索结果。

  • <meta>
    元数据是描述数据的数据指定文档的字符编码

该元素指定文档的字符编码——允许文档使用的字符集。 这意味着您的网页将能够处理显示任何语言：

例如，如果您将字符编码设置为ISO-8859-1 （拉丁字母的字符集），您的页面渲染可能看起来一团糟：

注意：某些浏览器（如 Chrome）会自动修复不正确的编码，因此根据您使用的浏览器，您可能看不到此问题。 无论如何，您仍应在页面上设置 utf-8 编码，以避免在其他浏览器中出现任何潜在问题。

  • 添加作者和描述
    许多<meta>元素包括name和content属性：

    • 它包含什么类型的信息。
    • 指定作者在很多方面都有好处：如果您对内容有任何疑问并且想与他们联系，了解页面的作者是很有用的。 一些内容管理系统具有自动提取页面作者信息并使其可用于此类目的的功能。
      指定包含与您的页面内容相关的关键字的描述很有用，因为它有可能使您的页面在搜索引擎中执行的相关搜索中显示得更高。

    • 向您的网站添加自定义图标
      可以通过以下方式将网站图标添加到您的页面：

      • 将其保存在与站点索引页面相同的目录中，以.ico格式保存（大多数浏览器将支持更常见格式的网站图标，如.gif或.png ，但使用.ico格式将确保它可以追溯到 Internet Explorer 6.)
      • 将以下行添加到 HTML 的<head>块中以引用它：
       <link rel= "icon" href= "favicon.ico" type= "image/x-icon" />

    • 将 CSS 和 JavaScript 应用于 HTML

     <!-- CSS --> <link rel= "stylesheet" href= "my-css-file.css" /> <!-- JavaScript --> <script src= "my-js-file.js" defer ></script>
    • 设置文档的主要语言您可以（并且确实应该）设置页面的语言。 这可以通过将 lang 属性添加到打开的 HTML 标记来完成。
     <html lang= "en-US" ></html>

    您还可以将文档的子部分设置为被识别为不同的语言。

     <p> Japanese example: <span lang= "ja" >ご飯が熱い。 </span> . </p>

    这在很多方面都很有用。 如果设置了语言（例如，允许它在特定语言的结果中正确显示），搜索引擎将更有效地索引您的 HTML 文档，并且它对使用屏幕阅读器的视觉障碍人士很有用（例如，单词“六”在法语和英语中都有，但发音不同。）
    这些代码由ISO 639-1标准定义。 您可以在 HTML 和 XML 中的语言标记中找到有关它们的更多信息。



原文:

The HTML head is the contents of the <head> element. It is the part that is not displayed in the web browser when the page is loaded. It contains information such as the page <title>, links to CSS, links to custom favicons(favorite icons), and other metadata(data about the HTML, such as the author, the important keywords that describe the document). Web browsers use information contained in the head to render the HTML document correctly.
We will introduce some major elements that are included in the head.

  • <title>
    This sets the title of the page, which is the title that appears in the browser tab the page is loaded in. The page title is also used to describe the page when it is bookmarked. This contents are also used in search results.

  • <meta>
    Metadata is data that describes data, and HTML has an "official" way of adding metadata to a document -- the <meta> element.

  • Specifying your document's character encoding

This element specifies the document's character encoding -- the character set that the document is permitted to use. utf-8 is a universal character set that includes pretty much any character from any human language. This means that your web page will be able to handle displaying any language:

If you set your character encoding to ISO-8859-1, for example(the character set for the Latin alphabet), your page rendering may appear all messed up:

Note: Some browsers(like Chrome) automatically fix incorrect encodings, so depending on what browser you use, you may not see this problem. You should still set an encoding of utf-8 on your page anyway to avoid any potential problems in other browsers.

  • Adding an author and description
    Many <meta> elements include name and content attributes:

    • name specifies the type of meta element it is; what type of information it contains.
    • content specifies the actual meta content. 
    <meta name="author" content="Chris Mills" />
<meta name="description" content="The MDN Web Docs Learning Area aims to provide
complete beginners to the Web with all they need to know to get
started with developing web sites and applications."
/>

    Specifying an author is beneficial in many ways: it is useful to be able to understand who wrote the page, if you have any questions about the content and you would like to contact them. Some content management systems have facilities to automatically extract page author information and make it available for such purposes.
    Specifying a description that includes keywords relating to the content of your page is useful as it has the potential to make your page appear higher in relevant searches performed in search engines.

  • Adding custom icons to your site
    A favicon can be added to your page by:

    • Saving it in the same directory as the site's index page, saved in .ico format(most browsers will support favicons in more common formats like .gif or .png, but using the .ico format will ensure it works as far back as Internet Explorer 6.)
    • Adding the following line into your HTML's <head> block to reference it: 
    <link rel="icon" href="favicon.ico" type="image/x-icon" />

  • Applying CSS and JavaScript to HTML

 <!-- CSS --> <link rel="stylesheet" href="my-css-file.css" /> <!-- JavaScript --> <script src="my-js-file.js" defer></script>
  • Setting the primary language of the document You can(and really should) set the language of your page. This can be done by adding the lang attribute to the opening HTML tag. 
 <html lang="en-US"></html>

You can also set subsections of your document to be recognized as different languages.

 <p>Japanese example: <span lang="ja">ご飯が熱い。</span>.</p>

This is useful in many ways. Your HTML document will be indexed more effectively by search engines if its language is set(allowing it to appear correctly in language-specific results, for example), and it is useful to people with visual impairments using screen readers(for exmple, the word "six" exists in both French and English, but is pronounced differently.)
These codes are defined by the ISO 639-1 standard. You can find more about them in Language tags in HTML and XML.

item.title: Laravel 8 查询日志示例 | Laravel 8 Query Log Example
item.description:
原贴@https ://codeanddeploy.com访问并下载示例代码：
在这篇文章中，我将向您展示如何实现Laravel 8 查询日志。 有时需要显示查询日志并确定最后执行的内容。 当您想在 Laravel 应用程序中调试多个查询时，这很有用。

在此示例中，我将向您展示可以在项目中应用的 3 种方法。

示例 #1

 $user = User :: select ( "*" ) -> toSql (); dd ( $user );

输出：

示例 #2：

 DB :: enableQueryLog (); $user = User :: get (); $query = DB :: getQueryLog (); dd ( $query );

输出：

 array:1 [▼ 0 => array:3 [▼ "query" => "select * from `users`" "bindings" => [] "time" => 30.66 ] ]

示例#3

 DB :: enableQueryLog (); $user = User :: get (); $query = DB :: getQueryLog (); $query = end ( $query ); dd ( $query );

输出：

 array:3 [▼ "query" => "select * from `users`" "bindings" => [] "time" => 22.04 ]

示例 #4

 \ DB :: enableQueryLog (); $users = \ DB :: table ( "users" ) -> get (); $query = \ DB :: getQueryLog (); dd ( end ( $query ));

输出：

 array:3 [▼ "query" => "select * from `users`" "bindings" => [] "time" => 26.94 ]

就是这样，您现在已经掌握了如何实现 Laravel 查询日志的基础知识。

我希望本教程可以帮助你。 如果您想下载此代码，请访问此处https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-8-query-log-example 。

快乐编码:)



原文:

Originally posted @ https://codeanddeploy.com visit and download the sample code:
https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-8-query-log-example

In this post, I will show you how to implement Laravel 8 Query log. Sometimes need to show the query log and to determine what was the last executed. This is useful when you want to debug the multiple queries in your Laravel application.

In this example I will show you a 3 methods that you can apply in your project.

Example #1 

$user = User::select("*")->toSql();
dd($user);

Output:

Example #2: 

DB::enableQueryLog();
$user = User::get();
$query = DB::getQueryLog();
dd($query);

Output:

array:1 [▼
  0 => array:3 [▼
    "query" => "select * from `users`"
    "bindings" => []
    "time" => 30.66
  ]
]

Example #3 

DB::enableQueryLog();
$user = User::get();
$query = DB::getQueryLog();
$query = end($query);
dd($query);

Output:

array:3 [▼
  "query" => "select * from `users`"
  "bindings" => []
  "time" => 22.04
]

Example #4 

\DB::enableQueryLog();
$users = \DB::table("users")->get();
$query = \DB::getQueryLog();
dd(end($query));

Output:

array:3 [▼
  "query" => "select * from `users`"
  "bindings" => []
  "time" => 26.94
]

That's it you have now the basic on how to implement Laravel query log.

item.title: 库 vs 框架 vs API | Library vs Framework vs API
item.description:
什么是库、框架和 API？ 这些术语被广泛使用，有时甚至可以互换使用来描述同一件事。

因此，让我首先说库、框架和 API 都是不同的东西。 它们可能用于完成相同的任务，但本质上是不同的。 我听到你问。 让我解释一下：

图书馆

基本上，库只是一堆方法/字段，可以重用以轻松完成任务，或者更常见的是任务域。

优点：

  • 更多的开发者自由
  • 通常更容易使用
  • 能够即时添加/删除/替换

缺点：

  • 开发者负责结构
  • 更长的成品之路
  • 人为错误的可能性更大

到目前为止，我在我的博客文章中一直在烦人地宣传，我正在开发我的图书馆Impart 。 您可以随时呈现网页或启动网站。 没有关于如何编写代码的模板，它提供了工具并让您可以自由地使用它们。

框架

将框架视为更具控制性的库。 框架将处理应用程序的一般流程，而开发人员没有发言权。

优点：

  • 框架负责结构
  • 通往成品的捷径
  • 人为错误的可能性较小

缺点：

  • 更少的开发人员自由度
  • 通常比库更复杂
  • 整合更难

框架的一个很好的例子是 .NET 框架。 嗯...我应该说 .NET，因为 .NET Core（现在称为 .NET）用开源许可证和更好的跨平台功能取代了它作为 Microsoft 框架解决方案。 微软让事情变得太复杂了，尤其是他们的“开源开发平台”品牌和他们的主要 CLI 命名为“dotnet”。 撇开切线不谈，只要知道 .NET 我的意思是跨平台框架，它就是一个框架，因为它控制应用程序的流程。 我所说的“它控制”实际上是指它下面的各个框架，因为 .NET 只是一组用于执行特定任务的框架。 这个词被滥用了很多。 我认为我从未听说过像 API 那样错误地使用与代码相关的术语。 简而言之，API（应用程序编程接口）实际上只是内部库/框架的公开（公共）部分。

优点：

  • 更好的用户安全性
  • 比硬件级交互更简单
  • 人为错误的可能性较小

缺点：

  • 更少的开发人员自由度
  • 参数传递可能很痛苦
  • 跨系统集成更加困难

回到微软，我喜欢 Windows 的 API： Win32 。 此 API 允许 Windows 不信任开发人员自行执行的系统命令。 这可能包括编辑剪贴板以弹出密码对话框等内容。 给定，传递给外部方法的参数可能会因不同的类型而变得烦人，并且必须为某些任务创建自定义结构。 但我确实理解为什么存在 Win32。 它为完成系统级任务的其他不安全和不受监管的方式增加了一层安全性和标准化。

网络 API

这是一种 API，用于通过 Web 请求发送、接收和处理信息。 考虑到它们对 Web 通信来说是必不可少的，本节将不包含赞成/反对部分。 相反，我将详细说明实现 Web API 的常用方法。

传入请求的标准化

  • 更灵活
  • 一般使用JSON格式
  • 无状态
  • 使用 HTTP(S)
  • 响应可以包含可执行代码

    • 通常需要较少的代码

  • 更严格
  • 仅使用 XML 格式
  • 可以使用 HTTP(S)、SMTP 和 TCP

    • 我很抱歉让这篇文章等待了更长的时间，我最近一直很忙，这需要大量的研究来汇总所有这些信息。 很可能我犯了一个错误，所以请随时纠正评论中的任何错误信息。

    改编自这个惊人的评论。

    谢谢阅读！



    原文:

    What are libraries, frameworks, and APIs? These terms get thrown around a lot and sometimes even used interchangably to describe the same thing.

    So let me begin by saying that libraries, frameworks, and APIs are all different things. They may be used to accomplish the same task, but are all fundamentally different. "What are those differences?" I hear you ask. Let me explain each one:

    Library

    Basically, a library is just a bunch of methods/fields that can be reused to easily accomplish a task, or more usually a domain of tasks.

    Pros:

    • More developer freedom
    • Usually easier to use
    • Able to add/remove/replace on-the-fly

    Cons:

    • Developer is responsible for the structure
    • Longer road to finished product
    • Bigger possibility for human error

    As I have annoyingly promoted throughout my blog posts thus far, I am developing my library Impart. The reason Impart is not a framework is because of the tool access. You can render a WebPage or start a Website anytime. There is no template for how the code is meant to be written, it provides the tools and gives you the freedom to use them.

    Framework

    Think of a framework as a more controlling library. A framework will handle the general flow of an application with no say from the developer.

    Pros:

    • Framework is responsible for the structure
    • Shorter road to finished product
    • Less possibility for human error

    Cons:

    • Less developer freedom
    • Usually more complex than libraries
    • Integration is more difficult

    A great example of a framework is the .NET framework. Well... I should say .NET, as .NET Core (now called .NET) replaced it as the Microsoft framework solution with an open source license and better cross-platform capabilities. Microsoft makes things way too complicated, especially with their branding of "open source developer platform" and naming their main CLI "dotnet". Tangeant aside, just know by .NET I mean the cross-platform framework that is specifically a framework because it controls the flow of an application. By "it controls" I really mean the individual frameworks underneath it because .NET is just a bunch of frameworks for doing specific tasks. (possible blog post about what is included in .NET upcoming?)

    API

    This term is misused a lot. I don't think I have ever heard a code-related term be used incorrectly as much as API has. In short, an API (Application Programming Interface) is really just the exposed (public) part of an internal library/framework.

    Pros:

    • Better user security
    • Simpler than hardware-level interactions
    • Less possibility for human error

    Cons:

    • Less developer freedom
    • Parameter passing can be a pain
    • Integration is more difficult across systems

    Going back to Microsoft, I love Windows' API: Win32. This API allows for system commands that Windows just doesn't trust the developer to do on their own. This can include things like editing the clipboard to having a password dialogue pop up. Given, parameter passing into the external methods can get annoying with the different types and having to create custom structs for certain tasks. But I do understand why Win32 exists. It adds a layer of security and standarization to an otherwise unsecure and non-regulated way of completing system-level tasks.

    Web API

    This is a type of API meant for sending, receiving, and processing information via web requests. This section will not have a pro/con portion considering that they are literally essential to web communication. I will instead elaborate on the common ways of implementing a web API.

    REST (Representational State Transfer):

    • Standardization of incoming requests
    • More flexible
    • Generally uses JSON formatting
    • Stateless
    • Uses HTTP(S)
    • Responses can contain executable code

    SOAP (Simple Object Access Protocol):

    • Generally less code required
    • More strict
    • Only uses XML formatting
    • Can use HTTP(S), SMTP, and TCP

    My apologies for a longer wait for this post, I have been busy lately and this required a fair amount of research to compile together all of this information. It is very possible I made a mistake, so feel free to correct any misinformation in the comments.

    Adapted from this amazing comment.

    Thanks for reading!

item.title: Laravel 8 TCPDF 教程生成 HTML 到 PDF | Laravel 8 TCPDF Tutorial Generate HTML to PDF
item.description:
原贴@https ://codeanddeploy.com访问并下载示例代码：
在这篇文章中，我将向您展示如何使用Laravel 8 TCPDF生成 HTML 到 PDF 的示例。 如果您需要从应用程序生成报告，通常 PDF 会很有用。 更简单的布局方法是使用 HTML 并将其转换为 PDF。

下面我将向您展示如何使用 TCPDF 包实现 Laravel 的一组示例。

第 1 步：Laravel 安装

如果您的本地没有安装 Laravel 8，只需运行以下命令：

 composer create - project -- prefer - dist laravel / laravel laravel - tcpdf cd laravel - tcpdf

第 2 步：安装 TCPDF 包

要在 Laravel 中生成 HTML 到 PDF，我们需要安装elibyy/tcpdf-laravel包。 运行以下命令：

 composer require elibyy / tcpdf - laravel

第 3 步：设置路由和控制器

让我们为 Laravel TCPDF 生成器创建路由和控制器。

路由.php/web.php

 <?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route ; use App\Http\Controllers\PdfController ; /* |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Web Routes |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These | routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which | contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great! | */ Route :: get ( '/' , function () { return view ( 'welcome' ); }); Route :: get ( 'pdf' , [ PdfController :: class , 'index' ]);

运行以下命令来制作控制器：

 php artisan make : controller PdfController

第 4 步：Laravel TCPDF 示例 #1

然后编辑生成的PdfController 。 见下文：

 <?php namespace App\Http\Controllers ; use PDF ; use Illuminate\Http\Request ; class PdfController extends Controller { public function index () { $html = '<h1 style="color:red;">Hello World</h1>' ; PDF :: SetTitle ( 'Hello World' ); PDF :: AddPage (); PDF :: writeHTML ( $html , true , false , true , false , '' ); PDF :: Output ( 'hello_world.pdf' ); } }

结果如下：

如您所见，我们生成了带有颜色的 PDF，这非常棒，因为我们可以支持 CSS 的基本样式。

第 5 步：下载 TCPDF 示例

现在，让我们尝试下载上面的 PDF 结果。 我们将 PDF 文件保存到我们的公共文件夹，然后下载。

 <?php namespace App\Http\Controllers ; use Illuminate\Http\Request ; use PDF ; class PdfController extends Controller { public function index () { $filename = 'hello_world.pdf' ; $html = '<h1 style="color:red;">Hello World</h1>' ; PDF :: SetTitle ( 'Hello World' ); PDF :: AddPage (); PDF :: writeHTML ( $html , true , false , true , false , '' ); PDF :: Output ( public_path ( $filename ), 'F' ); return response () -> download ( public_path ( $filename )); } }

第 6 步：没有别名的 TCPDF

正如我们在上面看到的，我们使用 PDF 作为我们的别名。 现在让我们使用 TCPDF 类，只需将它添加到您的控制器的上面使用Elibyy\TCPDF\Facades\TCPDF;

请参见下面的代码示例：

 <?php namespace App\Http\Controllers ; use Illuminate\Http\Request ; use Elibyy\TCPDF\Facades\TCPDF ; class PdfController extends Controller { public function index () { $filename = 'hello_world.pdf' ; $html = '<h1 style="color:red;">Hello World</h1>' ; $pdf = new TCPDF ; $pdf :: SetTitle ( 'Hello World' ); $pdf :: AddPage (); $pdf :: writeHTML ( $html , true , false , true , false , '' ); $pdf :: Output ( public_path ( $filename ), 'F' ); return response () -> download ( public_path ( $filename )); } }

第 7 步：从视图渲染 HTML

最好从视图中渲染 HTML，而不是在我们的控制器中手动渲染。

首先，您需要在resources/views/中创建一个文件夹，然后创建刀片文件，因此我将其sample.blade.php pdf编辑代码，请参见下面的示例：

 <!DOCTYPE html> <html> <head> <title> Generate Laravel TCPDF by codeanddeploy.com </title> </head> <body> <h1 style= "color:red;" > {!! $title !!} </h1> <br> <p> Your message here. </p> </body> </html>

然后编辑您的控制器代码。 请参见下面的示例：

 <?php namespace App\Http\Controllers ; use Illuminate\Http\Request ; use Elibyy\TCPDF\Facades\TCPDF ; class PdfController extends Controller { public function index () { $filename = 'hello_world.pdf' ; $data = [ 'title' => 'Hello world!' ]; $view = \ View :: make ( 'pdf.sample' , $data ); $html = $view -> render (); $pdf = new TCPDF ; $pdf :: SetTitle ( 'Hello World' ); $pdf :: AddPage (); $pdf :: writeHTML ( $html , true , false , true , false , '' ); $pdf :: Output ( public_path ( $filename ), 'F' ); return response () -> download ( public_path ( $filename )); } }

现在你已经基本了解了 Laravel 如何使用 TCPDF。

有关此软件包的更多详细信息，请访问此处。

我希望本教程可以帮助你。 如果您想下载此代码，请访问此处https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-8-tcpdf-tutorial-generate-html-to-pdf 。

快乐编码:)



原文:

Originally posted @ https://codeanddeploy.com visit and download the sample code:
https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-8-tcpdf-tutorial-generate-html-to-pdf

In this post, I will show you an example how to generate HTML to PDF using Laravel 8 TCPDF. Usually PDF is useful if you need to generate a report from your application. And the easier way to do the layout is using HTML and convert it as PDF.

Below I will show you a set of example how to implement Laravel with TCPDF package.

Step 1: Laravel Installation

If you don't have a Laravel 8 install in your local just run the following command below:

composer create-project --prefer-dist laravel/laravel laravel-tcpdf cd laravel-tcpdf

Step 2: Install TCPDF Package

To generate HTML to PDF in Laravel we need to install elibyy/tcpdf-laravel package. Run the following command below:

composer require elibyy/tcpdf-laravel

Step 3: Setup Routes and Controller

Let's create routes and controller for our Laravel TCPDF generator.

routes.php/web.php

<?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;
use App\Http\Controllers\PdfController; /*
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Web Routes
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
| Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These
| routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which
| contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great!
|
*/ Route::get('/', function () { return view('welcome');
}); Route::get('pdf', [PdfController::class, 'index']);

Run the command below to make a controller:

php artisan make:controller PdfController

Step 4: Laravel TCPDF Example #1

Then edit the PdfController generated. See below:

<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers; use PDF;
use Illuminate\Http\Request; class PdfController extends Controller
{ public function index() { $html = '<h1 style="color:red;">Hello World</h1>'; PDF::SetTitle('Hello World'); PDF::AddPage(); PDF::writeHTML($html, true, false, true, false, ''); PDF::Output('hello_world.pdf'); }
}

Here is the result:

As you can see we generated our PDF with color so this is awesome because we can support basic styles of CSS.

Step 5: Download TCPDF Example

Now, let's try to download the PDF result above. We will save the PDF file to our public folder then download it.

<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers; use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use PDF; class PdfController extends Controller
{ public function index() { $filename = 'hello_world.pdf'; $html = '<h1 style="color:red;">Hello World</h1>'; PDF::SetTitle('Hello World'); PDF::AddPage(); PDF::writeHTML($html, true, false, true, false, ''); PDF::Output(public_path($filename), 'F'); return response()->download(public_path($filename)); }
}

Step 6: TCPDF without an Alias

As we see above we use PDF as our alias. Now let's use the TCPDF class just add it to the above of your controller use Elibyy\TCPDF\Facades\TCPDF;

See below code example:

<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers; use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Elibyy\TCPDF\Facades\TCPDF; class PdfController extends Controller
{ public function index() { $filename = 'hello_world.pdf'; $html = '<h1 style="color:red;">Hello World</h1>'; $pdf = new TCPDF; $pdf::SetTitle('Hello World'); $pdf::AddPage(); $pdf::writeHTML($html, true, false, true, false, ''); $pdf::Output(public_path($filename), 'F'); return response()->download(public_path($filename)); }
}

Step 7: Render HTML from View

Better to render the HTML from view instead of doing it manually inside our controller.

First you need to create a folder in my case pdf inside resources/views/ then create blade file so I will named it sample.blade.php then edit the code see below example:

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head> <title>Generate Laravel TCPDF by codeanddeploy.com</title>
</head>
<body> <h1 style="color:red;">{!! $title !!}</h1> <br> <p>Your message here.</p>
</body>
</html>

Then edit your controller code. See below sample:

<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers; use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Elibyy\TCPDF\Facades\TCPDF; class PdfController extends Controller
{ public function index() { $filename = 'hello_world.pdf'; $data = [ 'title' => 'Hello world!' ]; $view = \View::make('pdf.sample', $data); $html = $view->render(); $pdf = new TCPDF; $pdf::SetTitle('Hello World'); $pdf::AddPage(); $pdf::writeHTML($html, true, false, true, false, ''); $pdf::Output(public_path($filename), 'F'); return response()->download(public_path($filename)); }
}

Now you have the basic already how do the Laravel with TCPDF.

For more details about this package visit it here.

I hope this tutorial can help you. Kindly visit here https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-8-tcpdf-tutorial-generate-html-to-pdf if you want to download this code.

Happy coding :)
item.author: codeanddeploy

item.title: 使用图像示例生成 Laravel PDF | Generate Laravel PDF with Image Example
item.description:
原贴@https ://codeanddeploy.com访问并下载示例代码：
在这篇文章中，我将向您展示如何使用图像生成 Laravel PDF 的示例。 在我之前的示例中，我有一个如何从 HTML 实现 Laravel PDF 的示例。 现在让我们将图像包含在您的 PDF 文件中。

通常，我们会在 PDF 中包含产品报告的图像、带有公司徽标的发票，或者可能是屏幕截图的报告。

首先，我们需要安装 Laravel。 如果已经安装就跳过。

第 1 步：Laravel 安装

如果您的本地没有安装 Laravel 8，只需运行以下命令：

 composer create - project -- prefer - dist laravel / laravel laravel - pdf - image - example cd laravel - pdf - image - example

第二步：安装 dompdf 包

要在 Laravel 中生成 HTML 到 PDF，我们需要安装barryvdh/laravel-dompdf包。 运行以下命令：

 composer require barryvdh / laravel - dompdf

第 3 步：设置路由和控制器

让我们为 Laravel PDF 生成器创建路由和控制器。

路由.php/web.php

 <?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route ; use App\Http\Controllers\PdfController ; /* |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Web Routes |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These | routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which | contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great! | */ Route :: get ( '/' , function () { return view ( 'welcome' ); }); Route :: get ( 'pdf' , [ PdfController :: class , 'index' ]);

运行以下命令来制作控制器：

 php artisan make : controller PdfController

然后编辑生成的PdfController 。 见下文：

 <?php namespace App\Http\Controllers ; use PDF ; use Illuminate\Http\Request ; class PdfController extends Controller { public function index () { $pdf = PDF :: loadView ( 'pdf.sample-with-image' , [ 'title' => 'CodeAndDeploy.com Laravel Pdf with Image Example' , 'description' => 'This is an example Laravel pdf with Image tutorial.' , 'footer' => 'by <a href="https://codeanddeploy.com">codeanddeploy.com</a>' ]); return $pdf -> download ( 'sample-with-image.pdf' ); } }

第 4 步：设置视图

现在，让我们使用图像生成器为 PDF 设置视图。 在此示例中，我在resources/views/中创建了一个pdf文件夹，然后创建了一个刀片文件sample-with-image.blade.php 。 请参见下面的示例代码：

 <!DOCTYPE html> <html> <head> <title> {{ $title }} </title> </head> <body> <p> {{ $description }} </p> <br> <p> Put your text here. </p> <p> Place your dynamic content here. </p> <br/> <br/> <br/> <strong> Public Folder: </strong> <img src= "{{ public_path('images/codeanddeploy.jpg') }}" style= "width: 20%" > <br/> <br/> <br/> <strong> Storage Folder: </strong> <img src= "{{ storage_path('app/public/images/codeanddeploy.jpg') }}" style= "width: 20%" > <br/> <br> <p style= "text-align: center;" > {!! $footer !!} </p> </body> </html>

注意：您必须在 public 中有images文件夹，在\storage\app\public中有images文件夹，并且您的图像必须存在于指定的文件夹中。 你可以随意命名它。

现在，我们的代码已经准备好了，让我们通过运行以下命令来测试它：

然后将下面的 URL 运行到您的浏览器：

 http :// 127.0.0.1 : 8000 / pdf

这是使用 dompdf 生成带有图像的 Laravel PDF 结果的示例：

我希望本教程可以帮助你。 如果您想下载此代码，请访问此处https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/generate-laravel-pdf-with-image-example 。

快乐编码:)



原文:

Originally posted @ https://codeanddeploy.com visit and download the sample code:
https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/generate-laravel-pdf-with-image-example

In this post, I will show you an example of how to generate a Laravel PDF with an image. In my previous example, I have an example of how to implement Laravel PDF from HTML. Now let's include the image in your PDF file.

Usually, we include images on PDF for a product report, invoices that have a company logo, or maybe a report that is a screenshot.

To start we need to install Laravel. Just skip if already installed.

Step 1: Laravel Installation

If you don't have a Laravel 8 install in your local just run the following command below:

composer create-project --prefer-dist laravel/laravel laravel-pdf-image-example cd laravel-pdf-image-example

Step 2: Install dompdf Package

To generate HTML to PDF in Laravel we need to install barryvdh/laravel-dompdf package. Run the following command below:

composer require barryvdh/laravel-dompdf

Step 3: Setup Routes and Controller

Let's create routes and controller for our Laravel PDF generator.

routes.php/web.php

<?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;
use App\Http\Controllers\PdfController; /*
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Web Routes
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
| Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These
| routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which
| contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great!
|
*/ Route::get('/', function () { return view('welcome');
}); Route::get('pdf', [PdfController::class, 'index']);

Run the command below to make a controller:

php artisan make:controller PdfController

Then edit the PdfController generated. See below:

<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers; use PDF;
use Illuminate\Http\Request; class PdfController extends Controller
{ public function index() { $pdf = PDF::loadView('pdf.sample-with-image', [ 'title' => 'CodeAndDeploy.com Laravel Pdf with Image Example', 'description' => 'This is an example Laravel pdf with Image tutorial.', 'footer' => 'by <a href="https://codeanddeploy.com">codeanddeploy.com</a>' ]); return $pdf->download('sample-with-image.pdf'); }
}

Step 4: Setup View

Now, let's set up our view for our PDF with an image generator. In this example, I create a pdf folder inside resources/views/then create a blade file sample-with-image.blade.php. See below sample code:

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head> <title>{{ $title }}</title>
</head>
<body> <p>{{ $description }}</p> <br> <p>Put your text here.</p> <p>Place your dynamic content here.</p> <br/> <br/> <br/> <strong>Public Folder:</strong> <img src="{{ public_path('images/codeanddeploy.jpg') }}" style="width: 20%"> <br/> <br/> <br/> <strong>Storage Folder:</strong> <img src="{{ storage_path('app/public/images/codeanddeploy.jpg') }}" style="width: 20%"> <br/> <br> <p style="text-align: center;">{!! $footer !!}</p>
</body>
</html>

NOTE: You must have images folder inside public and images folder inside \storage\app\public and your image must exist in the stated folder. You can name it what you want.

Now, our code is ready let's test it by running the commands below:

then run the URL below to your browser:


http://127.0.0.1:8000/pdf

Here is the example generated a result of Laravel PDF with images using dompdf:

I hope this tutorial can help you. Kindly visit here https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/generate-laravel-pdf-with-image-example if you want to download this code.

Happy coding :)
item.author: codeanddeploy

item.title: 使用 Github Actions 和 IFTTT 自动执行定期 Venmo 付款 | Automate Recurring Venmo Payments with Github Actions and IFTTT
item.description:
像许多修补匠一样，我喜欢自动化我生活的一小部分，而忽略我应该做的任何实际工作。 在偶然发现Joe 的 Venmo 自动化之后，我立即将所有重要的事情从我的盘子里扫了出来，以获得一些乐趣。 现在让我们在不到一个小时的时间内在 Venmo上设置自动付款 - 使用电子邮件通知让您高枕无忧！

为什么不使用 Nocode（Zapier、IFTTT 等）

您需要知道如何为本指南编写少量代码。 此设置是 Zapier Venmo 集成和 IFTTT Venmo 集成的替代方案，它们似乎不再存在（如果它们曾经存在的话）。 通常我会首先为项目寻找nocode 工具，但不幸的是，在这种情况下，您需要知道如何在线运行代码。

原料

您需要设置 3 件（不到 1 小时）：

  • 计划的触发器（GitHub 操作、AWS Cloudwatch 等）
  • 运行 Python 脚本的地方 + 它的依赖项（GitHub 操作、PythonAnywhere、带有Autocode的 Node.js 正在探索中）
  • 免费或廉价的通知服务（IFTTT、AWS SNS 等）

我使用GitHub Actions + Python 脚本 + IFTTT来发送电子邮件，但如果您有其他想法，请随时跳出常规。

如何在 Venmo 上设置自动付款

潜入你来找的肉和土豆，如何真正让这该死的东西运转起来。

  1. 注册 IFTTT 帐户（可能需要下载应用程序）。

  2. 在 IFTTT 中配置Webhooks 服务。

  3. 然后设置您选择的通知服务。 我的示例脚本发送有关在 IFTTT 提供的value1字段中发送的 Venmo 请求的元数据。 如果您使用相同的，您必须确保正确映射到您选择的通知服务。

  • 将您的 webhook URL 保存为 Secret，以便工作流可以访问它。 在浏览器中，转到GitHub Repo -> Settings -> Secrets -> New Repository Secret 。

  1. 此令牌与您的 Venmo 帐户具有相同的功能，因此请务必小心！ 除非您手动注销，否则它永远不会过期，如文档中所述。

    我计划在不久的将来更新本指南以使用支付链接（一个不需要帐户访问权限的 Venmo 应用程序的深层链接），但现在，您已被预先警告。
    您必须熟悉使用 Python 依赖项才能在本地运行这些脚本。

     from venmo_api import Client # https://github.com/mmohades/Venmo print("Login using account to get an access token for the API.") email = input('Venmo Email:') if '@' not in email: print('! yo what the heck you sure thats an email') raise SystemExit password = input('Venmo Password:') Client.get_access_token(username=email, password=password)
  • 通过转到GitHub Repo -> Settings -> Secrets -> New Repository Secret将令牌保存为 Secret VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN 。

  1. 然后 Venmo API 要求支付请求绑定到一个 ID，而不是我们人类在应用程序中使用的@username 。 我在设置期间进行了用户名映射并将它们添加为环境机密，但您可以轻松添加 1 个额外的 LOC 以在常规运行期间进行转换。

     user = venmo_client.user.get_user_by_username(username) # Key is the 'user.id' part venmo_client.payment.request_money(amount, note, target_user_id=user.id, privacy_setting=PaymentPrivacy.PRIVATE)

  2. 我使用的脚本有一个简单的入口点，然后为我希望它发出的每个 Venmo 请求定义一个单独的函数 YMMV。 您需要根据需要发出多少请求以及获取 Venmo 用户 ID 的方式进行一些小的调整。 最重要的部分可以归结为这个main.py ：

     # main.py import os from venmo_api import Client, PaymentPrivacy # requests is pulled in by venmo_api import requests TOKEN_KEY = 'VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN' IFTTT_WEBHOOK_KEY = 'IFTTT_WEBHOOK' def main(): # load the access token from environ access_token = os.environ.get(TOKEN_KEY) if access_token is None: raise ValueError('[!] EVERYTHING IS BROKEN WE CANT GET ACCESSS AHHHHHH') venmo_client = Client(access_token=access_token) .... # <venmo user id from mapping step> c_user_id = os.environ.get('C_USER_ID') amount = 20.0 note = f'Monthly Internet' try: venmo_client.payment.request_money(amount, note, target_user_id=c_user_id, privacy_setting=PaymentPrivacy.PRIVATE) print('Successfully requested for internet $$') msg = f'Requested ${amount} Internet from C.' except Exception as e: print(e) msg = '[!] Failed to request $$ for internet from C.' notify(msg) .... def notify(msg): # notify with IFTTT webhook ifttt_webhook_url = os.environ.get(IFTTT_WEBHOOK_KEY) if ifttt_webhook_url is None: raise ValueError('[!] Dang, no webhook so cant notify myself :(') json_data = { 'value1': msg } resp = requests.post(ifttt_webhook_url, json=json_data) print(resp.status_code) if resp.status_code >= 300: raise ValueError(f'Webhook resp was {resp.status_code}; not a success. Body: {resp.text}') main()

  3. 如果你没有，回去做。

    现在在.github/workflows/<workflow-name>.yml创建您的工作流定义。 这是您将在cron中定义您的日程安排的地方。 我的示例显示了每月的 Venmo 请求。

     # <workflow-name>.yml name: Run Recurring Venmo on: schedule: # 5/6pm EDT on the 10th of the month. - cron: "0 10 10 * *" workflow_dispatch: jobs: run: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v2 - name: Set up Python 3.7 uses: actions/setup-python@v2 with: python-version: 3.7 - name: Install dependencies run: | pip install pipenv pipenv install - name: Run script # https://pipenv.pypa.io/en/latest/advanced/#automatic-loading-of-env; this is somewhat silly but I wanted to finish quick run: | echo VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN=$VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN >> .env echo GF_VENMO_USER_ID=$GF_VENMO_USER_ID >> .env echo C_USER_ID=$C_USER_ID >> .env echo IFTTT_WEBHOOK=$IFTTT_WEBHOOK >> .env pipenv run python main.py env: VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN }} GF_VENMO_USER_ID: ${{ secrets.GF_VENMO_USER_ID }} C_USER_ID: ${{ secrets.C_USER_ID }} IFTTT_WEBHOOK: ${{ secrets.IFTTT_WEBHOOK }}

  4. 但是，嘿，我们学到了一些巧妙的东西并学习了一些新的自动化技巧。 时间花得很好。

切换到支付链接后在Autocode上编写 Node.js 函数。



原文:

Like so many tinkerers, I love to automate small parts of my life, while ignoring any actual work I should be doing. After stumbling on Joe’s Venmo automation, I immediately swept all the important things off my plate to have some fun. Now let’s set up automatic payments on Venmo in less than an hour — with email notifications for peace of mind!

Why not Nocode (Zapier, IFTTT, etc.)

You’ll need to know how to code a small amount for this guide. This setup is an alternative to the Zapier Venmo integration and IFTTT Venmo integration, which don’t seem to exist anymore (if they ever did). Venmo shut down their developer APIs and have had them in maintenance mode since 2016, so unlikely for anything to change on that front. Normally I look to nocode tools first for projects, but unfortunately in this case, you’ll need to know how to run code online.

Ingredients

The 3 pieces you will need to set this up (in <1 hour):

  • A scheduled trigger (GitHub actions, AWS Cloudwatch, etc.)
  • A place to run a Python script + it’s dependency (GitHub actions, PythonAnywhere, Node.js with Autocode is in exploration)
  • A free or cheap notification service (IFTTT, AWS SNS, etc.)

I use GitHub Actions + Python script + IFTTT for sending emails, but feel free to step off the beaten path if you have other ideas.

How to set up automatic payments on Venmo

Diving into the meat & potatoes you came for, how to actually get this dang thing running.

  1. (Optional) 💌 Set up IFTTT notifications

    ℹ️ If you don’t care about being notified, skip this step and remove the notify() code in script.

    IFTTT allows a variety of target services, I originally used SMS, then converted to email since it’s not an urgent alert.

    • Sign up for IFTTT account (might require downloading of the app).
    • Configure the Webhooks service in IFTTT.

    • Then set up your chosen notification service. My example script sends metadata about the Venmo request sent in the value1 field IFTTT provides. If you use the same, you'll have to make sure that is mapped correctly to your chosen notification service.

  • ✅ Use cURL or your favorite web request tool to test your webhook and ensure notifications are sending correctly.
  • Save your webhook URL as a Secret so the workflow can access it. In the browser, go to GitHub Repo -> Settings -> Secrets -> New Repository Secret.

  1. 🔐 Get Venmo access token

    ⚠️🚨
    This token has the same power with your Venmo account as you do, so be very careful with it! It will never expire unless you logout manually, as explained in the docs.

    I plan to update this guide to use Payment Links (a deeplink into the Venmo app that doesn’t require account access) in the near future, but for now, you are forewarned.
    ⚠️🚨

    You’ll have to be comfortable working with Python dependencies to run these scripts locally.

    from venmo_api import Client
# https://github.com/mmohades/Venmo

print("Login using account to get an access token for the API.")
email = input('Venmo Email:')
if '@' not in email:
    print('! yo what the heck you sure thats an email')
    raise SystemExit
password = input('Venmo Password:')

Client.get_access_token(username=email, password=password)
  • Save the token as the Secret VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN by going to GitHub Repo -> Settings -> Secrets -> New Repository Secret.

  1. (Optional) 🗺 Map Venmo usernames to IDs

    Then Venmo API requires payment requests to be tied to an ID, rather than the @username we humans use in the app. I did the mapping of usernames during setup and added them as environment secrets, but you can just as easily add 1 extra LOC to convert during regular runs.

    user = venmo_client.user.get_user_by_username(username)
# Key is the 'user.id' part
venmo_client.payment.request_money(amount, note, target_user_id=user.id, privacy_setting=PaymentPrivacy.PRIVATE)

  2. 🐍 Modify the Python script

    The script I use has a simple entry point, then defines a separate function for each Venmo request I want it to make, YMMV. You’ll need to make some small adjustments based on how many requests you need it to make & how you fetch Venmo user IDs. The most important bits can be boiled down to this main.py:

    # main.py

import os
from venmo_api import Client, PaymentPrivacy
# requests is pulled in by venmo_api
import requests

TOKEN_KEY = 'VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN'
IFTTT_WEBHOOK_KEY = 'IFTTT_WEBHOOK'

def main():
    # load the access token from environ
    access_token = os.environ.get(TOKEN_KEY)
    if access_token is None:
        raise ValueError('[!] EVERYTHING IS BROKEN WE CANT GET ACCESSS AHHHHHH')

    venmo_client = Client(access_token=access_token)

....
        # <venmo user id from mapping step>
        c_user_id = os.environ.get('C_USER_ID') 
        amount = 20.0
        note = f'Monthly Internet'
        try:
        venmo_client.payment.request_money(amount, note, target_user_id=c_user_id, privacy_setting=PaymentPrivacy.PRIVATE)
            print('Successfully requested for internet $$')
          msg = f'Requested ${amount} Internet from C.'
        except Exception as e:
            print(e)
            msg = '[!] Failed to request $$ for internet from C.'
        notify(msg)

....

def notify(msg):
    # notify with IFTTT webhook
    ifttt_webhook_url = os.environ.get(IFTTT_WEBHOOK_KEY)
    if ifttt_webhook_url is None:
        raise ValueError('[!] Dang, no webhook so cant notify myself :(')

    json_data = {
        'value1': msg
    }
    resp = requests.post(ifttt_webhook_url, json=json_data)
    print(resp.status_code)
    if resp.status_code >= 300:
        raise ValueError(f'Webhook resp was {resp.status_code}; not a success. Body: {resp.text}')

main()

  3. 👨‍💻 Configure GitHub Secrets & Actions

    ℹ️ Cron actions get disabled after 60 days of no activity on the repository - so either plan to push a commit every 50 days, or follow my approach and just wait until GitHub emails you.

    ✋ At this point you should have your VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN saved in Secrets, along with the optional IFTTT_WEBHOOK or USER_IDs values. if you didn’t, go back and do it.

    Now create your workflow definition at .github/workflows/<workflow-name>.yml . This is where you will define your schedule in cron. My example shows monthly Venmo requests.

    # <workflow-name>.yml

name: Run Recurring Venmo

on:
  schedule:
    # 5/6pm EDT on the 10th of the month.
    - cron: "0 10 10 * *"
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  run:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Set up Python 3.7
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: 3.7
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install pipenv
          pipenv install
      - name: Run script 
        # https://pipenv.pypa.io/en/latest/advanced/#automatic-loading-of-env; this is somewhat silly but I wanted to finish quick
        run: |
          echo VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN=$VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN >> .env
          echo GF_VENMO_USER_ID=$GF_VENMO_USER_ID >> .env
          echo C_USER_ID=$C_USER_ID >> .env
          echo IFTTT_WEBHOOK=$IFTTT_WEBHOOK >> .env
          pipenv run python main.py
        env:
          VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN }}
          GF_VENMO_USER_ID: ${{ secrets.GF_VENMO_USER_ID }}
          C_USER_ID: ${{ secrets.C_USER_ID }}
          IFTTT_WEBHOOK: ${{ secrets.IFTTT_WEBHOOK }}

  4. 🏖️ Sit back and relax - with your automation in place, you’re now saving MINUTES each month! 🤣

    But hey, we learned something neat and learned some new automation tricks. Time well spent.

🧪 Experiments & potential improvements

  • Writing Node.js function on Autocode after switching to Payment Links.
item.author: idontremember

item.title: Laravel 8 If Else 条件刀片示例 | Laravel 8 If Else Condition Blade Example
item.description:
原贴@https ://codeanddeploy.com访问并下载示例代码：
在这篇文章中，我将向您展示Laravel 8 If Else Condition Blade的示例。 这是学习 Laravel 时最重要的学习，因为我们将使用它来将逻辑放入 Laravel 应用程序中。

示例 #1：if..endif 条件

下面是我们刀片的 if..endif 条件示例。

句法：

 @ if ( condition ) // Statements inside body of if @ endif

例子：

 @ if ( count ( $posts )) You have a post ! @ endif

示例 #2：if..else..endif 条件

下面是我们的 if..else..endif 条件示例，如果条件为假然后显示 else 结果，这将很有帮助。

句法：

 @ if ( condition ) // Statements inside body of if @ else //Statements inside body of else @ endif

例子：

 @ if ( count ( $posts )) You have a post ! @ else You don ' t have a post ! @ endif

示例 #3：if..elseif..else..endif 条件

现在让我们做多重条件。 请参见下面的示例：

句法：

 @ if ( condition ) // Statements inside body of if @ elseif ( condition ) // Statements inside body of else if @ else //Statements inside body of else @ endif

例子：

 @ if ( count ( $posts ) == 1 ) You have a post ! @ elseif ( count ( $posts ) > 1 ) You have more than one posts ! @ else You don ' t have a post ! @ endif

就是这样，如果其他条件，您现在已经掌握了 Laravel 的基本知识。

我希望本教程可以帮助你。 如果您想下载此代码，请访问此处https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-8-if-else-condition-blade-example 。

快乐编码:)



原文:

Originally posted @ https://codeanddeploy.com visit and download the sample code:
https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-8-if-else-condition-blade-example

In this post, I will show you an example of Laravel 8 If Else Condition Blade. This is most important to learn when studying Laravel because we will use it to put logic in our Laravel application.

Example #1: if..endif Condition

Below is our sample of if..endif condition for our blade.

Syntax:

@if (condition) // Statements inside body of if
@endif

Example:

@if (count($posts)) You have a post!
@endif

Example #2: if..else..endif Condition

Below is our example of if..else..endif condition this is helpful if the condition is false then show else result.

Syntax:

@if (condition) // Statements inside body of if
@else //Statements inside body of else
@endif

Example:


@if (count($posts)) You have a post!
@else You don't have a post!
@endif

Example #3: if..elseif..else..endif Condition

Now let's do the multiple condition. See below example:

Syntax:

@if (condition) // Statements inside body of if
@elseif (condition) // Statements inside body of else if
@else //Statements inside body of else
@endif

Example:

@if (count($posts) == 1) You have a post!
@elseif(count($posts)>1) You have more than one posts!
@else You don't have a post!
@endif

That's it you have now the basic knowledge of Laravel if else condition.

I hope this tutorial can help you. Kindly visit here https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-8-if-else-condition-blade-example if you want to download this code.

Happy coding :)
item.author: codeanddeploy

item.title: 对首次购房者有什么建议？ | What are the tips for first-time home buyers?
item.description:
买房可能是您做过的最大投资，因此花点时间并确保您在Tata Carnatica做出正确的决定非常重要。 了解其他买家在他们家中寻找什么也是一个好主意，这样您就可以找到适合您需求的东西。

以下是给首次购房者的一些提示：

买便宜的房子。 这似乎违反直觉，但购买便宜的房子比购买昂贵的房子会给你更多的灵活性。 这将使您可以在房子里住得更久，然后再卖掉它并继续前进，并为您以后进行更改或翻新提供更多空间。

获得抵押贷款的预先批准。 获得贷方的预先批准意味着他们已经分析了您的情况并确定他们愿意在需要时向您借钱 - 而实际上不必这样做！ 这将使与卖家谈判时变得更容易，并使整个过程更加顺畅。

知道你能负担得起什么。 在你开始看房子之前，先弄清楚你可以花多少钱买一个。 访问 SmartAsset 的抵押贷款计算器，根据您的收入和其他债务估算您的每月还款额。 您还需要与财务顾问或信贷员一起超出预算，他们可以帮助确定购买房屋是否对您来说是可行的。



原文:

Buying a home is probably the biggest investment you'll ever make, so it's important to take your time and make sure that you're making the right decision at Tata Carnatica. It's also a good idea to get a sense of what other buyers are looking for in their homes, so that you can find something that fits your needs.

Here are some tips for first-time home buyers:

Buy an inexpensive house. It may seem counterintuitive, but buying an inexpensive house will give you more flexibility than buying an expensive one. This will allow you to live in the house for longer before having to sell it and move on, as well as giving you more room for making changes or renovations later on.

Get preapproved for a mortgage. Having preapproval from a lender means that they've analyzed your situation and determined that they would be willing to lend money to you if needed — without actually having to do it yet! This will make it easier when it comes time to negotiate with sellers and makes the process smoother overall.

Know what you can afford. Before you even start looking at homes, figure out how much you can afford to spend on one. Visit SmartAsset's mortgage calculator to estimate your monthly payment based on your income and other debts. You'll also want to go over your budget with a financial advisor or loan officer who can help determine whether buying a house is even feasible for you.
item.author: tata_carnatica

item.title: 在租我的第一间公寓之前我应该​​知道什么？ | What should I know before renting my first apartment?
item.description:
你要搬出你父母的房子，搬进你的第一套公寓。 恭喜！ 虽然这是你生命中激动人心的时刻，但你也将不得不处理一些新的责任。 在The Prestige City首次签订租约之前，请记住以下几点。

租一套公寓就像与另一个人建立关系：你必须在所有事情上达成一致，从分享多少菜到是否允许宠物进入大楼。 在您签署任何文件之前，请确保您确切知道您将住在什么样的地方以及您作为租户的期望。

在租你的第一间公寓之前，请仔细阅读租约，如果有任何不合理或不清楚的地方，请提出问题。 如果对押金或其他任何与入住有关的问题有任何疑问，请立即询问他们——否则，可能为时已晚！

租约是具有法律约束力的文件，因此请在签署前仔细阅读所有细节，认真对待它。 确保上面列出的所有内容与签署租赁协议之前口头（或通过电子邮件）达成的一致。 密切注意任何相关条款。



原文:

You're moving out of your parents' house and into your first apartment. Congratulations! While this is an exciting time in your life, you're also going to have to deal with some new responsibilities. Here are some things to keep in mind before signing a lease for the first time at The Prestige City.

Renting an apartment is like entering into a relationship with another person: You have to agree on everything from how many dishes you'll share to whether or not pets are allowed in the building. Before you sign anything, make sure you know exactly what kind of place you're going to be living in and what's expected of you as a tenant.

Before renting your first apartment, read over the lease carefully and ask questions if there's anything that doesn't make sense or isn't clear. If there are any questions about the deposit or anything else related to moving in, ask them right away — otherwise, it might be too late!

The lease is a legally binding document so take it seriously by reading over all the details carefully before signing it. Make sure that everything listed on it matches up with what was agreed upon verbally (or through e-mail) prior to signing the lease agreement. Pay close attention to any clauses pertaining.
item.author: prestige_city

item.title: Codecademy 最终项目：CPU 模拟器 | Codecademy Final Project: CPU Simulator
item.description:
我选择制作一个汇编程序来解析指令和数据输入，以便使用 MIPS32 指令集架构来存储内存总线和 CPU 进行处理。

我在 VS Code 中编写了程序，使用三个文件来拆分模拟器的不同部分。 主 CPU 模拟器文件包含汇编程序和 CPU 类。 汇编器类解析汇编语言文本文件并输出机器代码供CPU处理，CPU类是操作模拟器和调用其组件功能的主要类。

内存文件包含父内存类、从内存类继承的缓存和主内存类，以及连接CPU和内存的内存总线类。

这是数据指令输入文件，指令输入文件包含主要指令，包括高速缓存操作、立即数和寄存器加法、跳转指令和暂停终止指令。

主程序文件仅调用汇编程序和 CPU 类的实例，而 CPU 类调用包含其余 CPU 组件实例（包括内存总线）的控制单元。 然后内存总线调用缓存和主内存实例，将 CPU 连接到内存。

查看GitHub 上的代码



原文:

The portfolio project for Codecademy's computer architecture course in computer science is to make a CPU simulator that shows the inner workings of a CPU and its connection to memory by processing instructions and providing console output of input processing. I chose to make an assembler to parse instruction and data input for a memory bus to store and the CPU to process using MIPS32 instruction set architecture.

Python Code

I wrote the program in VS Code using three files to split up the different parts of the simulator. The main CPU simulator file contains the assembler and CPU classes. The assembler class parses assembly language text files and outputs machine code for the CPU to process and the CPU class is the main class to operate the simulator and call the functionality of its components.

The CPU components file contains classes for the three main components of the CPU, the control unit, registers, and arithmetic logic unit (ALU). The memory file contains the parent memory class, the cache and main memory classes that inherit from the memory class, and the memory bus class that connects the CPU to memory.

The data values and instructions for the CPU are modified Codecademy files and I added an instruction file to load the data values to CPU registers from memory instead of manually moving them to the registers. This is the data instruction input file and instruction input file contains the main instructions, which include a cache operation, immediate and register addition, a jump instruction, and a halt termination instruction.

The main program file only calls instances of the assembler and CPU classes and the CPU class calls the control unit which contains the rest of the CPU component instances, including the memory bus. The memory bus then calls the cache and main memory instances, connecting the CPU to memory.

See code on GitHub
item.author: lilacode

item.title: 生态系统和框架：我在 Netlify 的角色 | Ecosystem and Frameworks: My Role at Netlify
item.description:
我很好奇这些天你们都对哪些前端框架感兴趣？ 使用 Vue 和 React 等库构建了强大的元框架。 想到 Next.js ： Remix是一个新的竞争者，我们还有其他值得注意的项目，如SvelteKit 、 Astro 、 Eleventy等。

我在Netlify 担任新职务，在生态系统团队中从事框架工作。 目前，我们的工作是确保您部署到 Netlify 的任何内容都能无缝部署，因为我确信它会发展。 我这么说并不是为了宣传 Netlify，尽管这太不可思议了。 这是为了表达我对这种角色的兴奋。

我需要知道所有这些框架现在在我的新角色中是如何工作的，这非常令人兴奋。

例如，如果你不知道，Netlify 几周前发布了他们的Edge 功能。 我的同事萨尔玛有一篇关于他们的好帖子。

我的另一位出色的同事 Eduardo 发表了一篇关于 Netlify Edge 功能的深入探讨文章。

我提出这个是因为我在 Netlify 继续从事开源工作。 在 GitHub 上关注他们的代码。

我正在研究 Remix 框架中的 Netlify Edge 功能问题。

我们很高兴你在这里！

想知道更多？ 阅读Remix 的技术说明

此存储库包含 Remix 源代码。 这个 repo 正在进行中，因此我们感谢您在我们解决问题时的耐心等待。

文档

有关 Remix 的文档，请访问我们的网站。

另外，请加入我们的 Discord 社区。

文档是在每次发布时从docs目录中的文件自动生成的。

贡献

如果您对贡献代码和/或文档感兴趣，请参阅我们的贡献指南。

行为守则

如有任何问题，请参阅我们的行为准则……

一名核心团队成员在让 Edge 功能与 Remix 一起使用时遇到了问题。 经过一些有趣的侦探工作，我发现了问题所在。 相比之下，常规的无服务器函数在 Node.js 领域使用不​​符合 Web 标准的 polyfill。

它还没有修复，至少在写这篇文章时是这样，但 Remix 核心团队正在努力解决这个问题。 公开解决问题并分享我的发现非常有趣，因为这是开源宝贝！

我很高兴继续探索这个角色，与开发者社区、我们的客户和开源合作！

和平偷看！

Photo by Alex Kondratiev on Unsplash 亚历克斯·康德拉季耶夫在Unsplash上拍摄的照片



原文:

I'm curious what frontend frameworks you're all interested in these days? Powerful meta frameworks have been built using libraries like Vue and React. Next.js comes to mind: Remix is a new contender, and we have other notable projects like SvelteKit, Astro, Eleventy, etc.

I'm on the ecosystem team working on frameworks in my new role at Netlify. Our job, at the moment, because I'm sure it will evolve, is to ensure whatever you deploy to Netlify deploys seamlessly. I'm not saying this to promote Netlify, although it's incredible. It's to express my excitement at this type of role.

I need to know how all these frameworks work now in my new role, which is super exciting.

For example, if you weren't aware, Netlify released their Edge functions offering a couple of weeks ago. My coworker Salma has a great post about them.

My other awesome coworker Eduardo released a deep dive article about Netlify Edge functions.

I bring this up because I get to continue to work in open source in my role at Netlify. Edge functions use the amazing Deno project, a modern open-source runtime for JavaScript and Typescript.

Deno Land has 53 repositories available. Follow their code on GitHub.

I was looking into an issue with Netlify Edge functions within the Remix framework.

We are happy you're here!

Remix is a full stack web framework that lets you focus on the user interface and work back through web fundamentals to deliver a fast, slick, and resilient user experience that deploys to any Node.js server and even non-Node.js environments at the edge like Cloudflare Workers.

Want to know more? Read the Technical Explanation of Remix

This repository contains the Remix source code. This repo is a work in progress, so we appreciate your patience as we figure things out.

Documentation

For documentation about Remix, please visit our website.

Also, please join our community on Discord.

The documentation is automatically generated on each release from the files in the docs directory.

Contributing

If you're interested in contributing code and/or documentation, please see our guide to contributing.

Code of Conduct

Please see our code of conduct for any questions…

One of the core team members had issues getting Edge functions to work with Remix. After some fun detective work, I figured out the issue. TLDR; a polyfill wasn't web standards compliant, so the bug only occurred when Edge functions because Deno is web standards compliant. In contrast, regular serverless functions used the non-web standards-compliant polyfill in Node.js land.

It's not fixed yet, at least when writing this post, but the Remix core team is working on it. It was tons of fun to figure things out publicly and share my findings, as this is open-source baby!

I'm stoked to continue exploring this role, working with the developer community, our customers, and open-source!

Peace peeps!

Photo by Alex Kondratiev on Unsplash
item.author: nickytonline

item.title: 如何在 Laravel 8 中打印或获取上次执行的查询 | How to Print or Get Last Executed Query in Laravel 8
item.description:
原贴@https ://codeanddeploy.com访问并下载示例代码：
在这篇文章中，我将向你展示如何在 Laravel 8 应用程序中打印或获取最后执行的查询。 有时我们需要这样做来记录或调试并确定查询的性能。

幸运的是，Laravel 提供了一种获取最后执行的查询的方法，我将向您展示如何操作。

在 Laravel Eloquent 中获取最后一个查询

在这个例子中，我们将只添加 toSql() 方法到我们的 eloquent 查询中。 请参见以下示例：

 $user = User :: where ( 'id' , 1 ) -> toSql (); dd ( $user );

见下面的输出：

 "select * from `users` where `id` = ?"

在 Laravel Eloquent 中记录最后一个查询

在这个方法中，我们将记录最后一个 Laravel eloquent 查询。 请参见下面的示例代码：

 DB :: enableQueryLog (); $user = User :: get (); $query = DB :: getQueryLog (); dd ( $query );

样本输出：

 array:1 [▼ 0 => array:3 [▼ "query" => "select * from `users`" "bindings" => [] "time" => 30.66 ] ]

调试最后一个 Laravel Eloquent 查询

在这个示例中，我们将调试最后一个 Laravel eloquent 查询。 见下面的代码：

 DB :: enableQueryLog (); $user = User :: get (); $query = DB :: getQueryLog (); $query = end ( $query ); dd ( $query );

样本输出：

 array:3 [▼ "query" => "select * from `users`" "bindings" => [] "time" => 22.04 ]

获取/打印最后执行的 MySQL 查询

在本节中，我们将获取/打印最后执行的 MySQL 查询。 请参见以下示例：

 \ DB :: enableQueryLog (); $users = \ DB :: table ( "users" ) -> get (); $query = \ DB :: getQueryLog (); dd ( end ( $query ));

输出：

 array:3 [▼ "query" => "select * from `users`" "bindings" => [] "time" => 26.94 ]

现在你已经了解了如何在 Laravel 应用程序中记录/调试最后执行的查询。

我希望本教程可以帮助你。 如果您想下载此代码，请访问此处https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/how-to-print-or-get-last-executed-query-in-laravel-8 。

快乐编码:)



原文:

Originally posted @ https://codeanddeploy.com visit and download the sample code:
https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/how-to-print-or-get-last-executed-query-in-laravel-8

In this post, I will show you how to print or get the last executed query in your Laravel 8 application. Sometimes we need to do this to log or debug and determine what is the performance of our queries.

Luckily Laravel provides a method to get the last executed query and I will show you how.

Get Last Query in Laravel Eloquent

In this example, we will just add toSql() method to our eloquent query. See the below example:

$user = User::where('id',1)->toSql();
dd($user);

See below output:

"select * from `users` where `id` = ?"

Log Last Query in Laravel Eloquent

In this method, we will log our last Laravel eloquent query. See below example code:

DB::enableQueryLog();
$user = User::get();
$query = DB::getQueryLog();
dd($query);

Sample output:

array:1 [▼
  0 => array:3 [▼
    "query" => "select * from `users`"
    "bindings" => []
    "time" => 30.66
  ]
]

Debug the Last Laravel Eloquent Query

In this sample, we will debug the last Laravel eloquent query. See below code:

DB::enableQueryLog();
$user = User::get();
$query = DB::getQueryLog();
$query = end($query);
dd($query);

Sample output:

array:3 [▼
  "query" => "select * from `users`"
  "bindings" => []
  "time" => 22.04
]

Get/Print Last Executed MySQL Query

In this section, we will get/print the last executed MySQL query. See the following example:

\DB::enableQueryLog();
$users = \DB::table("users")->get();
$query = \DB::getQueryLog();
dd(end($query));

Output:

array:3 [▼
  "query" => "select * from `users`"
  "bindings" => []
  "time" => 26.94
]

Now you have an idea of how to log/debug the last executed query in your Laravel application.

I hope this tutorial can help you. Kindly visit here https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/how-to-print-or-get-last-executed-query-in-laravel-8 if you want to download this code.

Happy coding :)
item.author: codeanddeploy

item.title: Laravel 8 PDF 教程使用 DomPDF 生成 HTML 到 PDF 文件 | Laravel 8 PDF Tutorial Generate HTML to PDF file using DomPDF
item.description:
原贴@https ://codeanddeploy.com访问并下载示例代码：
在这篇文章中是关于如何使用 DomPDF 生成 HTML 到 PDF 文件的Laravel 8 PDF 教程。 有时在我们的应用程序中，我们需要生成用于报告的 PDF 文件或发票。 让我们使用 Laravel DomPDF 包来实现这一点，这对我们来说更容易，因为我们只使用 HTML 视图并将其转换为 PDF。

所以让我们开始教程并生成 Laravel PDF。

第 1 步：Laravel 安装

如果您的本地没有安装 Laravel 8，只需运行以下命令：

 composer create - project -- prefer - dist laravel / laravel laravel - pdf - example cd laravel - pdf - example

第二步：安装 dompdf 包

要在 Laravel 中生成 HTML 到 PDF，我们需要安装barryvdh/laravel-dompdf包。 运行以下命令：

 composer require barryvdh / laravel - dompdf

第 3 步：设置路由和控制器

让我们为 Laravel PDF 生成器创建路由和控制器。

路由.php/web.php
